/*  ** Add an object to the dtproperties table  */  create procedure dbo.dt_adduserobject  as   set nocount on   /*   ** Create the user object if it does not exist already   */   begin transaction    insert dbo.dtproperties (property) VALUES ('DtgSchemaOBJECT')    update dbo.dtproperties set objectid=@@identity      where id=@@identity and property='DtgSchemaOBJECT'   commit   return @@identity

create procedure dbo.dt_adduserobject_vcs      @vchProperty varchar(64)    as    set nocount on    declare @iReturn int      /*      ** Create the user object if it does not exist already      */      begin transaction          select @iReturn = objectid from dbo.dtproperties where property = @vchProperty          if @iReturn IS NULL          begin              insert dbo.dtproperties (property) VALUES (@vchProperty)              update dbo.dtproperties set objectid=@@identity                      where id=@@identity and property=@vchProperty              select @iReturn = @@identity          end      commit      return @iReturn

@sDatabaseName = @vchDatabaseName,                                          @sObjectName = @vchObjectName,                                          @sComment = @vchComment,                                          @sLoginName = @vchLoginName,                                          @sPassword = @vchPassword,                                          @iVCSFlags = @iVCSFlags,                                          @iActionFlag = @iActionFlag,                                          @sStream = @txStream2          end          else          begin              declare @iStreamObjectId int              declare @iReturnValue int                exec @iReturn = sp_OAGetProperty @iObjectId, 'GetStreamObject', @iStreamObjectId OUT              if @iReturn <> 0 GOTO E_OAError                select colid, text into #ProcLines              from syscomments              where id = object_id(@vchObjectName)              order by colid                declare @iCurProcLine int              declare @iProcLines int              select @iCurProcLine = 1              select @iProcLines = (select count(*) from #ProcLines)              while @iCurProcLine <= @iProcLines              begin                  declare @pos int                  select @pos = 1                  declare @iCurLineSize int                  select @iCurLineSize = len((select text from #ProcLines where colid = @iCurProcLine))                  while @pos <= @iCurLineSize                  begin                      declare @vchProcLinePiece varchar(255)                      select @vchProcLinePiece = convert(varchar(255),                          substring((select text from #ProcLines where colid = @iCurProcLine),                                    @pos, 255 ))                      exec @iReturn = sp_OAMethod @iStreamObjectId, 'AddStream', @iReturnValue OUT, @vchProcLinePiece                      if @iReturn <> 0 GOTO E_OAError                      select @pos = @pos + 255                  end                  select @iCurProcLine = @iCurProcLine + 1              end              drop table #ProcLines                exec @iReturn = sp_OAMethod @iObjectId,                                          'CheckIn_StoredProcedure',                                          NULL,                                          @sProjectName = @vchProjectName,                                          @sSourceSafeINI = @vchSourceSafeINI,                                          @sServerName = @vchServerName,                                          @sDatabaseName = @vchDatabaseName,                                 @sPassword = @vchPassword,                                          @iVCSFlags = @iVCSFlags,                                          @iActionFlag = @iActionFlag,                                          @sStream = ''          end            if @iReturn <> 0 GOTO E_OAError            if @iActionFlag = 1          begin              commit tran compile_all              if @@error <> 0 GOTO E_Compile_Fail          end        end    CleanUp:      return    E_Compile_Fail:      declare @lerror int      select @lerror = @@error      rollback tran compile_all      RAISERROR (@lerror,16,-1)      goto CleanUp    E_OAError:      if @iActionFlag = 1 rollback tran compile_all      exec dbo.dt_displayoaerror @iObjectId, @iReturn      goto CleanUp

create proc dbo.dt_checkoutobject      @chObjectType  char(4),      @vchObjectName varchar(255),      @vchComment    varchar(255),      @vchLoginName  varchar(255),      @vchPassword   varchar(255),      @iVCSFlags     int = 0,      @iActionFlag   int = 0/* 0 => Checkout, 1 => GetLatest, 2 => UndoCheckOut */    as    set nocount on    declare @iReturn int  declare @iObjectId int  select @iObjectId =0    declare @VSSGUID varchar(100)  select @VSSGUID = 'SQLVersionControl.VCS_SQL'    declare @iReturnValue int  select @iReturnValue = 0    declare @vchTempText varchar(255)    /* this is for our strings */  declare @iStreamObjectId int  select @iStreamObjectId = 0        declare @iPropertyObjectId int      select @iPropertyObjectId = (select objectid from dbo.dtproperties where property = 'VCSProjectID')        declare @vchProjectName   varchar(255)      declare @vchSourceSafeINI varchar(255)      declare @vchServerName    varchar(255)      declare @vchDatabaseName  varchar(255)      exec dbo.dt_getpropertiesbyid_vcs @iPropertyObjectId, 'VCSProject',       @vchProjectName   OUT      exec dbo.dt_getpropertiesbyid_vcs @iPropertyObjectId, 'VCSSourceSafeINI', @vchSourceSafeINI OUT      exec dbo.dt_getpropertiesbyid_vcs @iPropertyObjectId, 'VCSSQLServer',     @vchServerName    OUT      exec dbo.dt_getpropertiesbyid_vcs @iPropertyObjectId, 'VCSSQLDatabase',   @vchDatabaseName  OUT        if @chObjectType = 'PROC'      begin          /* Procedure Can have up to three streams             Drop Stream, Create Stream, GRANT stream */            exec @iReturn = sp_OACreate @VSSGUID, @iObjectId OUT            if @iReturn <> 0 GOTO E_OAError            exec @iReturn = sp_OAMethod @iObjectId,                                      'CheckOut_StoredProcedure',                                      NULL,                                      @sProjectName = @vchProjectName,                                      @sSourceSafeINI = @vchSourceSafeINI,                                      @sObjectName = @vchObjectName,                                      @sServerName = @vchServerName,                                      @sDatabaseName = @vchDatabaseName,                                      @sComment = @vchComment,                                      @sLoginName = @vchLoginName,                                      @sPassword = @vchPassword,                                      @iVCSFlags = @iVCSFlags,                                      @iActionFlag = @iActionFlag            if @iReturn <> 0 GOTO E_OAError              exec @iReturn = sp_OAGetProperty @iObjectId, CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.dt_displayoaerror      @iObject int,      @iresult int  as    set nocount on    declare @vchOutput      varchar(255)  declare @hr             int  declare @vchSource      varchar(255)  declare @vchDescription varchar(255)        exec @hr = sp_OAGetErrorInfo @iObject, @vchSource OUT, @vchDescription OUT        select @vchOutput = @vchSource + ': ' + @vchDescription      raiserror (@vchOutput,16,-1)        return

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.dt_displayoaerror_u      @iObject int,      @iresult int  as    set nocount on    declare @vchOutput      nvarchar(255)  declare @hr             int  declare @vchSource      nvarchar(255)  declare @vchDescription nvarchar(255)        exec @hr = sp_OAGetErrorInfo @iObject, @vchSource OUT, @vchDescription OUT        select @vchOutput = @vchSource + ': ' + @vchDescription      raiserror (@vchOutput,16,-1)        return

/*  ** Drop one or all the associated properties of an object or an attribute   **  ** dt_dropproperties objid, null or '' -- drop all properties of the object itself  ** dt_dropproperties objid, property -- drop the property  */  create procedure dbo.dt_droppropertiesbyid   @id int,   @property varchar(64)  as   set nocount on     if (@property is null) or (@property = '')    delete from dbo.dtproperties where objectid=@id   else    delete from dbo.dtproperties      where objectid=@id and property=@property
/*  ** Drop an object from the dbo.dtproperties table  */  create procedure dbo.dt_dropuserobjectbyid   @id int  as   set nocount on   delete from dbo.dtproperties where objectid=@id

/*   ** Generate an ansi name that is unique in the dtproperties.value column   */   create procedure dbo.dt_generateansiname(@name varchar(255) output)   as    declare @prologue varchar(20)    declare @indexstring varchar(20)    declare @index integer       set @prologue = 'MSDT-A-'    set @index = 1       while 1 = 1    begin     set @indexstring = cast(@index as varchar(20))     set @name = @prologue + @indexstring     if not exists (select value from dtproperties where value = @name)      break          set @index = @index + 1        if (@index = 10000)      goto TooMany    end      Leave:       return      TooMany:       set @name = 'DIAGRAM'    goto Leave

/*  ** Retrieve the owner object(s) of a given property  */  create procedure dbo.dt_getobjwithprop   @property varchar(30),   @value varchar(255)  as   set nocount on     if (@property is null) or (@property = '')   begin    raiserror('Must specify a property name.',-1,-1)    return (1)   end     if (@value is null)    select objectid id from dbo.dtproperties     where property=@property     else    select objectid id from dbo.dtproperties     where property=@property and value=@value

/*  ** Retrieve the owner object(s) of a given property  */  create procedure dbo.dt_getobjwithprop_u   @property varchar(30),   @uvalue nvarchar(255)  as   set nocount on     if (@property is null) or (@property = '')   begin    raiserror('Must specify a property name.',-1,-1)    return (1)   end     if (@uvalue is null)    select objectid id from dbo.dtproperties     where property=@property     else    select objectid id from dbo.dtproperties     where property=@property and uvalue=@uvalue

/*  ** Retrieve properties by id's  **  ** dt_getproperties objid, null or '' -- retrieve all properties of the object itself  ** dt_getproperties objid, property -- retrieve the property specified  */  create procedure dbo.dt_getpropertiesbyid   @id int,   @property varchar(64)  as   set nocount on     if (@property is null) or (@property = '')    select property, version, value, lvalue     from dbo.dtproperties     where  @id=objectid   else    select property, version, value, lvalue     from dbo.dtproperties     where  @id=objectid and @property=property

/*  ** Retrieve properties by id's  **  ** dt_getproperties objid, null or '' -- retrieve all properties of the object itself  ** dt_getproperties objid, property -- retrieve the property specified  */  create procedure dbo.dt_getpropertiesbyid_u   @id int,   @property varchar(64)  as   set nocount on     if (@property is null) or (@property = '')    select property, version, uvalue, lvalue     from dbo.dtproperties     where  @id=objectid   else    select property, version, uvalue, lvalue     from dbo.dtproperties     where  @id=objectid and @property=property

create procedure dbo.dt_getpropertiesbyid_vcs      @id       int,      @property varchar(64),      @value    varchar(255) = NULL OUT    as        set nocount on        select @value = (          select value                  from dbo.dtproperties                  where @id=objectid and @property=property                  )

create procedure dbo.dt_getpropertiesbyid_vcs_u      @id       int,      @property varchar(64),      @value    nvarchar(255) = NULL OUT    as        set nocount on        select @value = (          select uvalue                  from dbo.dtproperties                  where @id=objectid and @property=property                  )

create proc dbo.dt_isundersourcecontrol      @vchLoginName varchar(255) = '',      @vchPassword  varchar(255) = '',      @iWhoToo      int = 0 /* 0 => Just check project; 1 => get list of objs */    as    set nocount on    declare @iReturn int  declare @iObjectId int  select @iObjectId = 0    declare @VSSGUID varchar(100)  select @VSSGUID = 'SQLVersionControl.VCS_SQL'    declare @iReturnValue int  select @iReturnValue = 0    declare @iStreamObjectId int  select @iStreamObjectId   = 0    declare @vchTempText varchar(255)        declare @iPropertyObjectId int      select @iPropertyObjectId = (select objectid from dbo.dtproperties where property = 'VCSProjectID')        declare @vchProjectName   varchar(255)      declare @vchSourceSafeINI varchar(255)      declare @vchServerName    varchar(255)      declare @vchDatabaseName  varchar(255)      exec dbo.dt_getpropertiesbyid_vcs @iPropertyObjectId, 'VCSProject',       @vchProjectName   OUT      exec dbo.dt_getpropertiesbyid_vcs @iPropertyObjectId, 'VCSSourceSafeINI', @vchSourceSafeINI OUT      exec dbo.dt_getpropertiesbyid_vcs @iPropertyObjectId, 'VCSSQLServer',     @vchServerName    OUT      exec dbo.dt_getpropertiesbyid_vcs @iPropertyObjectId, 'VCSSQLDatabase',   @vchDatabaseName  OUT        if (@vchProjectName IS NULL) or (@vchSourceSafeINI  IS NULL) or (@vchServerName IS NULL) or (@vchDatabaseName IS NULL)      begin          RAISERROR('Not Under Source Control',16,-1)          return      end        if @iWhoToo = 1      begin            /* Get List of Procs in the project */          exec @iReturn = sp_OACreate @VSSGUID, @iObjectId OUT          if @iReturn <> 0 GOTO E_OAError            exec @iReturn = sp_OAMethod @iObjectId,                                      'GetListOfObjects',                                      NULL,                                      @vchProjectName,                                      @vchSourceSafeINI,                                      @vchServerName,                                      @vchDatabaseName,                                      @vchLoginName,                                      @vchPassword            if @iReturn <> 0 GOTO E_OAError            exec @iReturn = sp_OAGetProperty @iObjectId, 'GetStreamObject', @iStreamObjectId OUT            if @iReturn <> 0 GOTO E_OAError            create table #ObjectList (id int identity, vchObjectlist varchar(255))            select @vchTempText = 'STUB'          while @vchTempText IS NOT NULL          begin              exec @iReturn = sp_OAMethod @iStreamObjectId, 'GetStream', @iReturnValue OUT, @vchTempText OUT              if @iReturn <> 0 GOTO E_OAError                if (@vchTempText IS NOT NULL) insert into #ObjectList (vchObjectlist ) select @vchTempText          end            select vchObjectlist from #ObjectList order by id      end    CleanUp:      return    E_OAError:      exec dbo.dt_displayoaerror @iObjectId, @iReturn      goto CleanUp

create procedure dbo.dt_removefromsourcecontrol    as        set nocount on        declare @iPropertyObjectId int      select @iPropertyObjectId = (select objectid from dbo.dtproperties where property = 'VCSProjectID')        exec dbo.dt_droppropertiesbyid @iPropertyObjectId, null        /* -1 is returned by dt_droppopertiesbyid */      if @@error <> 0 and @@error <> -1 return 1        return 0

/*  ** If the property already exists, reset the value; otherwise add property  **  id -- the id in sysobjects of the object  **  property -- the name of the property  **  value -- the text value of the property  **  lvalue -- the binary value of the property (image)  */  create procedure dbo.dt_setpropertybyid   @id int,   @property varchar(64),   @value varchar(255),   @lvalue image  as   set nocount on   declare @uvalue nvarchar(255)    set @uvalue = convert(nvarchar(255), @value)    if exists (select * from dbo.dtproperties      where objectid=@id and property=@property)   begin    --    -- bump the version count for this row as we update it    --    update dbo.dtproperties set value=@value, uvalue=@uvalue, lvalue=@lvalue, version=version+1     where objectid=@id and property=@property   end   else   begin    --    -- version count is auto-set to 0 on initial insert    --    insert dbo.dtproperties (property, objectid, value, uvalue, lvalue)     values (@property, @id, @value, @uvalue, @lvalue)   end

/*  ** If the property already exists, reset the value; otherwise add property  **  id -- the id in sysobjects of the object  **  property -- the name of the property  **  uvalue -- the text value of the property  **  lvalue -- the binary value of the property (image)  */  create procedure dbo.dt_setpropertybyid_u   @id int,   @property varchar(64),   @uvalue nvarchar(255),   @lvalue image  as   set nocount on   --    -- If we are writing the name property, find the ansi equivalent.    -- If there is no lossless translation, generate an ansi name.    --    declare @avalue varchar(255)    set @avalue = null    if (@uvalue is not null)    begin     if (convert(nvarchar(255), convert(varchar(255), @uvalue)) = @uvalue)     begin      set @avalue = convert(varchar(255), @uvalue)     end     else     begin      if 'DtgSchemaNAME' = @property      begin       exec dbo.dt_generateansiname @avalue output      end     end    end    if exists (select * from dbo.dtproperties      where objectid=@id and property=@property)   begin    --    -- bump the version count for this row as we update it    --    update dbo.dtproperties set value=@avalue, uvalue=@uvalue, lvalue=@lvalue, version=version+1     where objectid=@id and property=@property   end   else   begin    --    -- version count is auto-set to 0 on initial insert    --    insert dbo.dtproperties (property, objectid, value, uvalue, lvalue)     values (@property, @id, @avalue, @uvalue, @lvalue)   end

create procedure dbo.[sel_FE7EAB053E2347A666549F3C53174942] (@tablenick int, @max_rows int = NULL,   @guidlast uniqueidentifier = NULL)    AS     set nocount on   set rowcount 0   if  @max_rows is not null    begin    -- used to select data for initial pop. of subscriber for dynamic filtered publication    set rowcount @max_rows    declare @lin varbinary (255)    declare @cv varbinary (2048)    declare @replnick int    declare @objid int    declare @ccols int      select @objid = objid from sysmergearticles where nickname = @tablenick    select @ccols = max(colid) from syscolumns where id = @objid        exec dbo.sp_MSgetreplnick @nickname = @replnick out    if (@@error <> 0) or @replnick IS NULL             begin           RAISERROR (14055, 11, -1)           RETURN(1)           end                        set @lin = { fn UPDATELINEAGE(0x0, @replnick) }       set @cv = { fn INITCOLVS(@ccols, @replnick) }      select @tablenick, v.[rowguid], coalesce (c.generation,1),      coalesce (c.lineage, @lin), coalesce (c.colv1, @cv), * from [dbo].[MYINDAIA_TPO_ITEM_VIEW] v left outer join  MSmerge_contents c on         v.[rowguid] = c.rowguid and c.tablenick = @tablenick where v.[rowguid] > @guidlast         order by v.[rowguid]    return (1)      end   insert into #belong (tablenick, rowguid, flag, partchangegen, joinchangegen)    select ct.tablenick, ct.rowguid, 0, ct.partchangegen, ct.joinchangegen       from  MSmerge_contents ct, #genlist g, [dbo].[MYINDAIA_TPO_ITEM_VIEW] v where ct.tablenick = @tablenick       and ct.generation = g.generation        and ct.rowguid = v.[rowguid]      UNION      select ct.tablenick, ct.rowguid, 0, ct.partchangegen, ct.joinchangegen       from  MSmerge_contents ct, #genlist g, [dbo].[MYINDAIA_TPO_ITEM_VIEW] v where ct.tablenick = @tablenick       and ct.partchangegen = g.generation       and ct.rowguid = v.[rowguid]     if @@ERROR <> 0    begin    RAISERROR('Error selecting from view' , 16, -1)    return (1)     end

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.sp_alterdiagram   (    @diagramname  sysname,    @owner_id int = null,    @version  int,    @definition  varbinary(max)   )   WITH EXECUTE AS 'dbo'   AS   BEGIN    set nocount on       declare @theId    int    declare @retval   int    declare @IsDbo    int        declare @UIDFound   int    declare @DiagId   int    declare @ShouldChangeUID int       if(@diagramname is null)    begin     RAISERROR ('Invalid ARG', 16, 1)     return -1    end       execute as caller;    select @theId = DATABASE_PRINCIPAL_ID();      select @IsDbo = IS_MEMBER(N'db_owner');     if(@owner_id is null)     select @owner_id = @theId;    revert;       select @ShouldChangeUID = 0    select @DiagId = diagram_id, @UIDFound = principal_id from dbo.sysdiagrams where principal_id = @owner_id and name = @diagramname         if(@DiagId IS NULL or (@IsDbo = 0 and @theId <> @UIDFound))    begin     RAISERROR ('Diagram does not exist or you do not have permission.', 16, 1);     return -3    end       if(@IsDbo <> 0)    begin     if(@UIDFound is null or USER_NAME(@UIDFound) is null) -- invalid principal_id     begin      select @ShouldChangeUID = 1 ;     end    end      -- update dds data       update dbo.sysdiagrams set definition = @definition where diagram_id = @DiagId ;      -- change owner    if(@ShouldChangeUID = 1)     update dbo.sysdiagrams set principal_id = @theId where diagram_id = @DiagId ;      -- update dds version    if(@version is not null)     update dbo.sysdiagrams set version = @version where diagram_id = @DiagId ;      return 0   END

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[sp_atz_flp_po] ( @nr_processo char(18), @cd_empresa char(5) ) AS  /*  SET XACT_ABORT ON  BEGIN TRAN    DECLARE @nr_processo char(18)  SELECT @nr_processo = '4500181714'  --*/  SET NOCOUNT ON    DECLARE    @cd_evento         char(3),    @cd_ev_basico      char(3),    @cd_ev_futuro      char(3),    @in_aplicavel      char(1),    @pz_do_ev_basico   float,    @pz_ate_ev_futuro  float,    @prazo             int,    @dt_realizacao     datetime,    @dt_ev_basico      datetime,    @dt_ev_futuro      datetime,    @dt_limite         datetime,    @dt_prevista       datetime,    @nr_dias_conclusao int,    @cd_ev_conclusor   char(3),    @cd_ev_abre_proc   char(3),    @hoje              datetime,    @cd_status         char(1),    @cd_servico        char(3),    @in_hora_eventos   bit,    @in_prazo_util     char(1),    @in_prazo_feriado  char(1)    SET @cd_ev_abre_proc = '003'  SET @hoje = CONVERT( datetime, CONVERT( varchar(10), GETDATE(), 103 ), 103 )    SELECT @cd_servico = PR.CD_SERVICO  FROM BROKER.DBO.TPROCESSO PR (NOLOCK)  WHERE PR.NR_REFERENCIA = @nr_processo    AND PR.CD_CLIENTE    = @cd_empresa    -- Limpa previsões e data limite, atualiza a ordem dos eventos  IF EXISTS(SELECT F.CD_EVENTO            FROM TFLP_PO F (NOLOCK), TSERVICO_EVENTO SE (NOLOCK)             WHERE F.NR_PROCESSO = @nr_processo              AND F.CD_EMPRESA  = @cd_empresa              AND SE.CD_SERVICO = @cd_servico              AND SE.CD_EVENTO  = F.CD_EVENTO              AND SE.NR_ORDEM  <> F.NR_ORDEM)  BEGIN   --atualiza a ordem dos eventos no fup do processo e apaga todas as previsões e datas limite    UPDATE F SET      DT_PREVISTA = NULL,      DT_LIMITE   = NULL,      NR_ORDEM    = SE.NR_ORDEM    FROM TFLP_PO F (NOLOCK), TSERVICO_EVENTO SE (NOLOCK)    WHERE F.NR_PROCESSO = @nr_processo      AND F.CD_EMPRESA  = @cd_empresa      AND SE.CD_SERVICO = @cd_servico      AND SE.CD_EVENTO  = F.CD_EVENTO  END  ELSE  BEGIN   --apaga todas as previsões e datas limite    UPDATE TFLP_PO SET      DT_PREVISTA = NULL,      DT_LIMITE   = NULL    WHERE NR_PROCESSO = @nr_processo      AND CD_EMPRESA  = @cd_empresa  END      SELECT    @nr_dias_conclusao = ISNULL( NR_DIAS_CONCLUSAO_PO, 0 ),    @cd_ev_conclusor   = CD_EVENTO_CONCLUSOR_PO  FROM BROKER.DBO.TPARAMETROS (NOLOCK)    SELECT @in_hora_eventos  = ISNULL(IN_HORA_EVENTOS, 0)  FROM BROKER.DBO.TCLIENTE_SERVICO CS (NOLOCK)     INNER JOIN BROKER.DBO.TPROCESSO P (NOLOCK) ON P.CD_SERVICO  = CS.CD_SERVICO                                      AND P.CD_CLIENTE  = CS.CD_CLIENTE                                      AND P.CD_UNID_NEG = CS.CD_UNID_NEG                                      AND P.CD_PRODUTO  = CS.CD_PRODUTO  WHERE P.NR_REFERENCIA = @nr_processo    AND P.CD_CLIENTE    = @cd_empresa    AND P.CD_PRODUTO    <> '01'    -- Determina Limites para Evento Base  DECLARE cPrevisto CURSOR FOR    SELECT F.CD_EVENTO, F.IN_APLICAVEL, SE.CD_EV_BASICO, SE.PZ_DO_EV_BASICO, F.DT_REALIZACAO    FROM TFLP_PO F (NOLOCK), TSERVICO_EVENTO SE (NOLOCK)    WHERE F.NR_PROCESSO = @nr_processo      AND F.CD_EMPRESA  = @cd_empresa      AND SE.CD_SERVICO = @cd_servico      AND SE.CD_EVENTO  = F.CD_EVENTO      AND ISNULL( SE.CD_EV_BASICO, '' ) <> ''     ORDER  BY SE.NR_ORDEM    OPEN cPrevisto  FETCH cPrevisto INTO @cd_evento, @in_aplicavel, @cd_ev_basico, @pz_do_ev_basico, @dt_realizacao    WHILE @@fetch_status = 0  BEGIN    SELECT @dt_ev_basico = ISNULL(DT_REALIZACAO,DT_PREVISTA)    FROM TFLP_PO (NOLOCK)    WHERE NR_PROCESSO = @nr_processo      AND CD_EMPRESA  = @cd_empresa      AND CD_EVENTO   = @cd_ev_basico      SET @prazo = ISNULL( @pz_do_ev_basico, 0)      IF @in_aplicavel = '0' SET @prazo = 0        SELECT @in_prazo_util    = ISNULL(IN_PRAZO_UTIL, '0'),           @in_prazo_feriado = ISNULL(IN_PRAZO_FERIADO, '0')    FROM BROKER.DBO.TSERVICO_EVENTO (NOLOCK)    WHERE CD_SERVICO = @cd_servico      AND CD_EVENTO  = @cd_evento      /*UPDATE TFLP_PO    SET DT_PREVISTA = DATEADD( day, @prazo, ISNULL( @dt_ev_basico, @hoje ) )    WHERE NR_PROCESSO = @nr_processo      AND CD_EMPRESA  = @cd_empresa      AND CD_EVENTO = @cd_evento*/        PRINT '----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------'    PRINT 'EVENTO: ' + @cd_evento    SELECT @dt_realizacao = ISNULL(@dt_ev_basico, @hoje)    WHILE (@dt_realizacao IS NOT NULL) AND (@prazo <> 0)    BEGIN        IF @prazo > 0            SET @dt_realizacao = DATEADD(HOUR, 1, @dt_realizacao)        ELSE            SET @dt_realizacao = DATEADD(HOUR, -1, @dt_realizacao)        IF ((@in_prazo_util = '0') OR (DATEPART(WEEKDAY, @dt_realizacao) NOT IN (1, 7))) AND           ((@in_prazo_feriado = '0') OR ((SELECT COUNT(*)                                           FROM TFERIADO (NOLOCK)                                           WHERE DT_FERIADO = CONVERT(DATETIME, CONVERT(VARCHAR, @dt_realizacao, 103), 103)) = 0))            IF @prazo > 0                SET @prazo = @prazo - 1            ELSE                SET @prazo = @prazo + 1        PRINT 'PRAZO: ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, @prazo)        PRINT 'DATA : ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, @dt_realizacao)    END          UPDATE TFLP_PO    SET DT_PREVISTA = ISNULL(@dt_realizacao, @hoje)    WHERE NR_PROCESSO = @nr_processo      AND CD_EMPRESA  = @cd_empresa      AND CD_EVENTO   = @cd_evento      FETCH cPrevisto INTO @cd_evento, @in_aplicavel, @cd_ev_basico, @pz_do_ev_basico, @dt_realizacao  END  CLOSE cPrevisto  DEALLOCATE cPrevisto    SET NOCOUNT OFF  /*  select nr_processo, cd_evento, dt_prevista, dt_realizacao  from tflp_po (nolock) where nr_processo = @nr_processo order by nr_ordem  ROLLBACK TRAN  SET XACT_ABORT OFF  --*/

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[sp_atz_flp_po_item] ( @nr_processo char(18), @nr_item char(3) = Null, @cd_empresa char(5) ) AS    /*    SET XACT_ABORT ON    BEGIN TRAN        DECLARE      @nr_processo char(18),      @nr_item     char(3)        SET @nr_processo = '4500844403'    SET @nr_item     = '001'    --*/    SET NOCOUNT ON        DECLARE      @cd_servico        char(3),      @cd_evento         char(3),      @cd_ev_basico      char(3),      @cd_ev_futuro      char(3),      @in_aplicavel      char(1),      @pz_do_ev_basico   float,      @pz_ate_ev_futuro  float,      @prazo             int,      @dt_realizacao     datetime,      @dt_ev_basico      datetime,      @dt_ev_futuro      datetime,      @dt_limite         datetime,      @dt_prevista       datetime,      @nr_dias_conclusao int,      @cd_ev_conclusor   char(3),      @cd_ev_abre_proc   char(3),      @cd_ev_envio_nf    char(3),      @cd_ev_prev_fabr   char(3),      @cd_ev_merc_fabr   char(3),      @in_auto_merc_fabr char(1),      @dt_hoje           datetime,      @cd_status         char(1),    @in_hora_eventos   bit,    @in_prazo_util     char(1),    @in_prazo_feriado  char(1)      --seleciona os eventos utilizados no script    --SELECT @cd_ev_abre_proc = CD_EV_ABRE_PROC FROM TPARAMETROS (NOLOCK)    SET @cd_ev_abre_proc = '003'    SET @cd_ev_envio_nf  = '041'    SET @cd_ev_prev_fabr = '146'    SET @cd_ev_merc_fabr = '164'        SELECT @cd_servico = PR.CD_SERVICO, @in_auto_merc_fabr = CH.IN_AUTO_MERC_FABR      FROM BROKER.DBO.TPROCESSO PR (NOLOCK), BROKER.DBO.TCLIENTE_HABILITACAO CH (NOLOCK)     WHERE PR.NR_REFERENCIA = @nr_processo     AND PR.CD_CLIENTE  = @cd_empresa         AND PR.CD_CLIENTE  = CH.CD_CLIENTE        AND PR.CD_UNID_NEG = CH.CD_UNID_NEG        AND PR.CD_PRODUTO  = CH.CD_PRODUTO        --seleciona a data de hoje    SET @dt_hoje = CONVERT( datetime, CONVERT( varchar(10), GETDATE(), 103 ), 103 )        -- VERIFICA SE TEM ALGUM EVENTO NA TSERVICO_EVENTO COM NR_ORDEM DIFERENTE DA TFOLLOWUP    IF EXISTS(SELECT F.CD_EVENTO              FROM TFLP_PO_ITEM F (NOLOCK), TSERVICO_EVENTO SE (NOLOCK)               WHERE F.NR_PROCESSO = @nr_processo                AND F.CD_EMPRESA  = @cd_empresa              AND F.NR_ITEM     = @nr_item                AND SE.CD_SERVICO = @cd_servico                AND SE.CD_EVENTO  = F.CD_EVENTO                AND SE.NR_ORDEM  <> F.NR_ORDEM)    BEGIN     --atualiza a ordem dos eventos no fup do processo e apaga todas as previsões e datas limite      UPDATE F SET        DT_PREVISTA = NULL,        DT_LIMITE   = NULL,        NR_ORDEM    = SE.NR_ORDEM      FROM TFLP_PO_ITEM F (NOLOCK), TSERVICO_EVENTO SE (NOLOCK)      WHERE F.NR_PROCESSO = @nr_processo       AND F.CD_EMPRESA  = @cd_empresa       AND F.NR_ITEM     = @nr_item        AND SE.CD_SERVICO = @cd_servico        AND SE.CD_EVENTO  = F.CD_EVENTO    END    ELSE    BEGIN      --apaga todas as previsões e datas limite      UPDATE TFLP_PO_ITEM SET        DT_PREVISTA = NULL,        DT_LIMITE   = NULL      WHERE NR_PROCESSO = @nr_processo       AND CD_EMPRESA  = @cd_empresa       AND NR_ITEM     = @nr_item    END      SELECT @in_hora_eventos  = ISNULL(IN_HORA_EVENTOS, 0)  FROM BROKER.DBO.TCLIENTE_SERVICO CS (NOLOCK)     INNER JOIN BROKER.DBO.TPROCESSO P (NOLOCK) ON P.CD_SERVICO  = CS.CD_SERVICO                                      AND P.CD_CLIENTE  = CS.CD_CLIENTE                                      AND P.CD_UNID_NEG = CS.CD_UNID_NEG                                      AND P.CD_PRODUTO  = CS.CD_PRODUTO  WHERE P.NR_REFERENCIA = @nr_processo    AND P.CD_CLIENTE    = @cd_empresa    AND P.CD_PRODUTO    <> '01'      --seleciona a qtde de dias para conclusão, se nulo atribui 0(zero)    --e seleciona o codigo do evento conclusor da tabela de parametros    SELECT      @nr_dias_conclusao = ISNULL( NR_DIAS_CONCLUSAO_PO, 0 ),      @cd_ev_conclusor   = CD_EVENTO_CONCLUSOR_PO    FROM BROKER.DBO.TPARAMETROS (NOLOCK)        -- Determina Limites para Evento Base    DECLARE cPrevisto CURSOR LOCAL FOR      SELECT F.CD_EVENTO, F.IN_APLICAVEL, SE.CD_EV_BASICO, SE.PZ_DO_EV_BASICO, F.DT_REALIZACAO      FROM TFLP_PO_ITEM F (NOLOCK), TSERVICO_EVENTO SE (NOLOCK)      WHERE F.NR_PROCESSO = @nr_processo        AND F.CD_EMPRESA  = @cd_empresa      AND F.NR_ITEM     = @nr_item        AND SE.CD_SERVICO = @cd_servico        AND SE.CD_EVENTO  = F.CD_EVENTO        AND ISNULL( SE.CD_EV_BASICO, '' ) <> ''       ORDER BY SE.NR_ORDEM      PRINT 'ITEM XX: ' + ISNULL(@NR_ITEM, 'VAZIO')    OPEN cPrevisto    FETCH cPrevisto INTO @cd_evento, @in_aplicavel, @cd_ev_basico, @pz_do_ev_basico, @dt_realizacao      WHILE @@fetch_status = 0    BEGIN        IF (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TFLP_PO_ITEM (NOLOCK) WHERE CD_EVENTO = @cd_ev_basico AND NR_PROCESSO = @nr_processo AND NR_ITEM = @nr_item) > 0        SELECT @dt_ev_basico = ISNULL( DT_REALIZACAO, DT_PREVISTA )          FROM TFLP_PO_ITEM (NOLOCK)          WHERE NR_PROCESSO = @nr_processo           AND CD_EMPRESA  = @cd_empresa         AND NR_ITEM     = @nr_item           AND CD_EVENTO   = @cd_ev_basico      ELSE        SELECT @dt_ev_basico = ISNULL( DT_REALIZACAO, DT_PREVISTA )          FROM TFLP_PO (NOLOCK)          WHERE NR_PROCESSO = @nr_processo           AND CD_EMPRESA  = @cd_empresa         AND CD_EVENTO   = @cd_ev_basico          SET @prazo = ISNULL( @pz_do_ev_basico, 0)      IF @in_aplicavel = '0' SET @prazo = 0          SELECT @in_prazo_util    = ISNULL(IN_PRAZO_UTIL, '0'),           @in_prazo_feriado = ISNULL(IN_PRAZO_FERIADO, '0')    FROM BROKER.DBO.TSERVICO_EVENTO (NOLOCK)    WHERE CD_SERVICO = @cd_servico      AND CD_EVENTO  = @cd_evento        /*UPDATE TFLP_PO_ITEM      SET    DT_PREVISTA = DATEADD( day, @prazo, @dt_ev_basico )      WHERE  NR_PROCESSO = @nr_processo        AND CD_EMPRESA  = @cd_empresa      AND  NR_ITEM     = @nr_item        AND  CD_EVENTO   = @cd_evento*/        PRINT '----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------'    PRINT 'EVENTO: ' + @cd_evento    PRINT 'Data1: ' + ISNULL(CONVERT(VARCHAR, @dt_ev_basico, 103), '')    SELECT @dt_realizacao = @dt_ev_basico    WHILE (@dt_realizacao IS NOT NULL) AND (@prazo <> 0)    BEGIN        IF @prazo > 0            SET @dt_realizacao = DATEADD(HOUR, 1, @dt_realizacao)        ELSE            SET @dt_realizacao = DATEADD(HOUR, -1, @dt_realizacao)        IF ((@in_prazo_util = '0') OR (DATEPART(WEEKDAY, @dt_realizacao) NOT IN (1, 7))) AND           ((@in_prazo_feriado = '0') OR ((SELECT COUNT(*)                                           FROM TFERIADO (NOLOCK)                                           WHERE DT_FERIADO = CONVERT(DATETIME, CONVERT(VARCHAR, @dt_realizacao, 103), 103)) = 0))            IF @prazo > 0                SET @prazo = @prazo - 1            ELSE                SET @prazo = @prazo + 1        PRINT 'PRAZO: ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, @prazo)        PRINT 'DATA : ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, @dt_realizacao)    END          UPDATE TFLP_PO_ITEM    SET DT_PREVISTA = @dt_realizacao    WHERE NR_PROCESSO = @nr_processo      AND CD_EMPRESA  = @cd_empresa      AND NR_ITEM     = @nr_item      AND CD_EVENTO   = @cd_evento        FETCH cPrevisto INTO @cd_evento, @in_aplicavel, @cd_ev_basico, @pz_do_ev_basico, @dt_realizacao    END    CLOSE cPrevisto    DEALLOCATE cPrevisto        --verifica se alimenta automatico mercadoria na fabrica    IF @in_auto_merc_fabr = '1'    BEGIN      IF (SELECT COUNT(*)           FROM TESTAGIO_PROCESSO EP (NOLOCK)           INNER JOIN TPO_ITEM POI (NOLOCK) ON (POI.NR_PROCESSO = EP.NR_REFERENCIA                                           AND POI.NR_ITEM_CLIENTE = EP.NR_ITEM_CLIENTE                                            AND POI.CD_EMPRESA  = EP.CD_EMPRESA                                          AND POI.NR_PARCIAL = EP.NR_PARCIAL)           WHERE POI.NR_PROCESSO = @nr_processo            AND POI.CD_EMPRESA  = @cd_empresa           AND POI.NR_ITEM     = @nr_item            AND EP.NR_PROCESSO_DES IS NULL) > 0      BEGIN        --seleciona a previsão de envio de nf e aumenta em 2 dias        SELECT @dt_prevista = DATEADD(day, 2, DT_PREVISTA)          FROM TFLP_PO_ITEM (NOLOCK)         WHERE NR_PROCESSO = @nr_processo           AND CD_EMPRESA  = @cd_empresa         AND NR_ITEM     = @nr_item           AND CD_EVENTO   = @cd_ev_envio_nf        --atualiza a realização de prev na fabrica com a data acima        UPDATE TFLP_PO_ITEM            SET DT_PREVISTA = @dt_prevista         WHERE NR_PROCESSO = @nr_processo         AND CD_EMPRESA  = @cd_empresa           AND NR_ITEM     = @nr_item           AND CD_EVENTO   = @cd_ev_prev_fabr        --atualiza a previsão de merc. na fabr. com a data acima        UPDATE TFLP_PO_ITEM            SET DT_PREVISTA = @dt_prevista         WHERE NR_PROCESSO = @nr_processo           AND CD_EMPRESA  = @cd_empresa         AND NR_ITEM     = @nr_item           AND CD_EVENTO   = @cd_ev_merc_fabr      END    END        SET NOCOUNT OFF    /*    select *  from tflp_po_item (nolock) where nr_processo = @nr_processo and nr_item = @nr_item order by nr_ordem    ROLLBACK TRAN    SET XACT_ABORT OFF    --*/

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[sp_calc_comissao]( @nr_processo char(18), @Resultado float output ) AS        /*    SET XACT_ABORT ON    BEGIN TRAN        DECLARE @nr_processo char(18)    DECLARE @Resultado float   SELECT @nr_processo = '0101IA-0821-08'      --*/             DECLARE @cd_cliente               char(5)    DECLARE @cd_unid_neg              char(2)    DECLARE @cd_produto               char(2)    DECLARE @cd_servico               char(4)    DECLARE @cd_regime_trib_aux       char(1)    DECLARE @cd_local_desembarque     char(4)    DECLARE @cd_unid_neg_local        char(2)    DECLARE @vl_cif_mn                float    DECLARE @vl_cif_dolar             float    DECLARE @vl_vmle_mn               float    DECLARE @cd_regime_trib           char(1)    DECLARE @tp_dt_base               char(1)    DECLARE @vl_num_taxa              float    DECLARE @vl_den_taxa              float    DECLARE @tp_base_calc_taxa        char(1)    DECLARE @cd_moeda_taxa            char(3)    DECLARE  float    DECLARE @vl_den_fora_regiao       float    DECLARE @tp_base_calc_fora_regiao char(1)    DECLARE @cd_moeda_fora_regiao     char(3)    DECLARE @vl_num_min               float    DECLARE  float    DECLARE @tp_base_calc_max         char(1)    DECLARE @cd_moeda_max             char(3)    DECLARE @dt_base                  datetime    DECLARE @vl_despesas              numeric (13,6)    DECLARE @vl_direitos_isentos      numeric (13,6)    DECLARE @vl_moeda_taxa            numeric (13,6)    DECLARE @vl_moeda_acr             numeric (13,6)    DECLARE @vl_moeda_fora_regiao     numeric (13,6)    DECLARE @vl_moeda_min             numeric (13,6)    DECLARE @vl_moeda_max             numeric (13,6)    DECLARE @vl_base_calculo          numeric (13,6)    DECLARE @vl_minimo                numeric (13,6)    DECLARE @vl_maximo                numeric (13,6)    DECLARE @vl_resultado             numeric (13,6)    DECLARE @cd_base_calc             char(1)    DECLARE @in_embut_frt_itens       char(1)    DECLARE @in_embut_seg_itens       char(1)    DECLARE @vl_total_frete_mn        numeric(14,2)    DECLARE @vl_total_seguro_mn       numeric(14,2)        --SELECIONA OS VALORES PARA CALCULO    SELECT @cd_base_calc        = '0',           @cd_cliente           = CD_CLIENTE,           @cd_unid_neg          = CD_UNID_NEG,           @cd_produto           = CD_PRODUTO,           @cd_servico           = CD_SERVICO,           @cd_local_desembarque = CD_LOCAL_DESEMBARQUE,           @vl_cif_mn            = ISNULL( VL_CIF_MN, 0 ),           @vl_vmle_mn           = ISNULL( VL_MLE_MN, 0 ),           @vl_cif_dolar         = ISNULL( VL_CIF_DOLAR, 0 )     FROM  TPROCESSO     WHERE  ( NR_PROCESSO = @nr_processo )      IF @@rowcount = 0    BEGIN      -- Processo/Previsao nao cadastrado      SELECT  @Resultado = 0      IF @cd_base_calc = '0'       RETURN(1)      ELSE        RETURN(8)    END    ELSE    BEGIN      -- PESQUISA LOCAL DE EMBARQUE      SELECT @Resultado         = 0        SELECT @cd_unid_neg_local = CD_UNID_NEG_LOCAL        FROM TLOCAL_EMBARQUE       WHERE CD_LOCAL_EMB = @cd_local_desembarque        IF @@rowcount = 0         SELECT @cd_unid_neg_local = @cd_unid_neg            SELECT @cd_regime_trib_aux = '0'       SELECT @cd_regime_trib           = CD_REGIME_TRIB,             @tp_dt_base               = TP_DT_BASE,             @vl_num_taxa              = ISNULL( VL_NUM_TAXA, 0 ),             @vl_den_taxa              = ISNULL( VL_DEN_TAXA, 0 ),             @tp_base_calc_taxa        = TP_BASE_CALC_TAXA,             @cd_moeda_taxa            = CD_MOEDA_TAXA,             @vl_num_acr               = ISNULL( VL_NUM_ACR, 0 ),             @vl_den_acr               = ISNULL( VL_DEN_ACR, 0 ),             @tp_base_calc_acr         = TP_BASE_CALC_ACR,             @cd_moeda_acr             = CD_MOEDA_ACR,             @vl_num_fora_regiao       = ISNULL( VL_NUM_FORA_REGIAO, 0 ),             @vl_den_fora_regiao       = ISNULL( VL_DEN_FORA_REGIAO, 0 ),             @tp_base_calc_fora_regiao = TP_BASE_CALC_FORA_REGIAO,             @cd_moeda_fora_regiao     = CD_MOEDA_FORA_REGIAO,             @vl_num_min               = ISNULL( VL_NUM_MIN, 0 ),             @vl_den_min               = ISNULL( VL_DEN_MIN, 0 ),             @tp_base_calc_min         = TP_BASE_CALC_MIN,             @cd_moeda_min             = CD_MOEDA_MIN,             @vl_num_max               = ISNULL( VL_NUM_MAX, 0 ),             @vl_den_max               = ISNULL( VL_DEN_MAX, 0 ),             @tp_base_calc_max         = TP_BASE_CALC_MAX,             @cd_moeda_max             = CD_MOEDA_MAX      FROM   TRECEITAS_IMP      WHERE  CD_CLIENTE     = @cd_cliente          AND             CD_UNID_NEG    = @cd_unid_neg         AND             CD_PRODUTO     = @cd_produto          AND             CD_SERVICO     = @cd_servico          AND             CD_ITEM        = '822'             AND             CD_REGIME_TRIB = @cd_regime_trib_aux  AND             IN_ATIVO       = '1'      IF @@rowcount = 0      BEGIN        -- Receita nao cadastrada         RETURN(2)      END      ELSE      BEGIN        --Verifica Frete e Seguro Embutido nos Itens        IF ISNULL( @Resultado, 0 ) = 0        BEGIN              SELECT @in_embut_frt_itens = IN_EMBUT_FRT_ITENS,                 @in_embut_seg_itens = IN_EMBUT_SEG_ITENS,                 @vl_total_frete_mn  = VL_TOTAL_FRETE_MN,                 @vl_total_seguro_mn = VL_TOTAL_SEG_MN          FROM   TDECLARACAO_IMPORTACAO          WHERE  NR_PROCESSO = @nr_processo              IF @in_embut_frt_itens = '1' SELECT @vl_vmle_mn = @vl_vmle_mn - @vl_total_frete_mn          IF @in_embut_seg_itens = '1' SELECT @vl_vmle_mn = @vl_vmle_mn - @vl_total_seguro_mn        END            -- PESQUISA DATA BASE        SELECT @dt_base = CONVERT( datetime, CONVERT( char(10), GETDATE(), 103 ), 103 )            -- PESQUISA DESPESAS        IF @tp_base_calc_taxa IN ( '1', '2' )         BEGIN          SELECT @vl_despesas = SUM(                  CASE ISNULL( FAT.VL_ASSIST, 0 ) - ISNULL( FAT.VL_IR, 0 ) ) * (-1)                 END )           FROM   TFATURAMENTO_CC FAT          WHERE  FAT.IN_CANCELADO = '0' AND                 FAT.IN_FATURADO = '0' CD_ITEM_EXTOR_NUM FROM TPARAMETROS ) AND                 FAT.CD_ITEM NOT IN ( SELECT CD_ITEM_DEVOL_NUM FROM TPARAMETROS ) AND                 FAT.CD_ITEM NOT IN ( SELECT CD_ITEM_SALDO_CRE FROM TPARAMETROS ) AND                 FAT.CD_ITEM NOT IN ( SELECT CD_ITEM_SALDO_DEB FROM TPARAMETROS ) AND                 FAT.CD_ITEM NOT IN ( SELECT CD_ITEM_RECEB_SD FROM TPARAMETROS ) AND                 FAT.CD_ITEM NOT IN ( SELECT CD_ITEM_PAGTO_SD FROM TPARAMETROS ) AND                 FAT.CD_ITEM NOT IN ( SELECT CD_ITEM_EXT_RECEB FROM TPARAMETROS ) AND                 FAT.CD_ITEM NOT IN ( SELECT CD_ITEM_EXT_PAGTO FROM TPARAMETROS ) AND                 FAT.CD_ITEM NOT IN ( SELECT CD_ITEM_NAO_FAT FROM TPARAMETROS ) AND                 FAT.CD_ITEM NOT IN ( SELECT CD_ITEM_IR FROM TPARAMETROS ) AND                 FAT.CD_ITEM NOT IN ( SELECT CD_ITEM_COMISSAO FROM TPARAMETROS ) AND                 FAT.CD_ITEM NOT IN ( SELECT CD_ITEM_PAGO_CLI FROM TPARAMETROS ) AND                 ISNULL( FAT.CD_ITEM_NAO_FAT, '' ) <> '*'         END            -- PESQUISA DIREITOS ISENTOS        IF ( @tp_base_calc_taxa        = '2' )         BEGIN          SELECT @vl_direitos_isentos = SUM(                  CASE FAT.IN_RESTITUI                     WHEN '0' THEN ( ISNULL( FAT.VL_ITEM, 0 ) + ISNULL( FAT.VL_ASSIST, 0 ) - ISNULL( FAT.VL_IR, 0 ) )                     WHEN '1' THEN ( ISNULL( FAT.VL_ITEM, 0 ) + ISNULL( FAT.VL_ASSIST, 0 ) - ISNULL( FAT.VL_IR, 0 ) ) * (-1)                 END )           FROM   TFATURAMENTO_CC FAT          WHERE  FAT.IN_CANCELADO = '0' AND                 FAT.IN_FATURADO = '0' AND                  FAT.NR_PROCESSO = @nr_processo AND                 FAT.CD_ITEM NOT IN ( SELECT CD_ITEM_RECEB_NUM FROM TPARAMETROS ) AND                 FAT.CD_ITEM NOT IN ( SELECT CD_ITEM_EXTOR_NUM FROM TPARAMETROS ) AND                 FAT.CD_ITEM NOT IN ( SELECT CD_ITEM_DEVOL_NUM FROM TPARAMETROS ) AND                 FAT.CD_ITEM NOT IN ( SELECT CD_ITEM_SALDO_CRE FROM TPARAMETROS ) AND                 FAT.CD_ITEM NOT IN ( SELECT CD_ITEM_SALDO_DEB FROM TPARAMETROS ) AND                 FAT.CD_ITEM NOT IN ( SELECT CD_ITEM_RECEB_SD FROM TPARAMETROS ) AND                 FAT.CD_ITEM NOT IN ( SELECT CD_ITEM_PAGTO_SD FROM TPARAMETROS ) AND                 FAT.CD_ITEM NOT IN ( SELECT CD_ITEM_EXT_RECEB FROM TPARAMETROS ) AND                 FAT.CD_ITEM NOT IN ( SELECT /***** CALCULO DE DIAS A COBRAR/CORRIDOS DE DEMURRAGE *****/  --/*  CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[sp_calc_dias_cntr] (     @nr_processo      char(18),     @nr_cntr          char(20),     @nr_dias_corridos int OUTPUT,     @nr_dias_cobrar   int OUTPUT  ) AS  --*/  /*  SET XACT_ABORT ON  BEGIN TRAN    DECLARE @nr_processo      char(18)  DECLARE @nr_cntr          char(20)  DECLARE @nr_dias_corridos int  DECLARE @nr_dias_cobrar   int    SELECT @nr_processo = '0101IM-002235-15'  SELECT @nr_cntr     = 'HLXU5290814'  --*/    DECLARE    @dt_ent       datetime,    @dt_devolucao datetime,    @dt_demurrage datetime,    @dt_ini       datetime,    @dt_fim       datetime,    @dt_temp      datetime,    @nr_free_time int,    @nr_dias      int,    @tp_dias      char(1)    SELECT    @dt_ent       = DT_ENT,    @dt_devolucao = DT_DEVOLUCAO_CNTR,    @nr_free_time = ISNULL(NR_FREE_TIME, 0),    @tp_dias      = TP_DIAS  FROM TPROCESSO_CNTR (NOLOCK)  WHERE NR_PROCESSO = @nr_processo    AND NR_CNTR     = @nr_cntr    IF @dt_devolucao IS NULL  BEGIN    SET @dt_ini = @dt_ent    SET @dt_fim = CONVERT(datetime, CONVERT(varchar(10), GETDATE(), 103), 103)  END  ELSE  BEGIN    SET @dt_ini = @dt_ent    SET @dt_fim = @dt_devolucao  END    --IF @dt_ini > @dt_fim Print 'deu merda'    --RETURN 0    -- Calculando Dt. da Demurrage  SET @nr_dias      = 0  SET @dt_demurrage = @dt_ent    IF @tp_dias = '3'    SET @dt_temp = @dt_ent  ELSE    SET @dt_temp = @dt_ent + 1    WHILE @nr_dias <> @nr_free_time  BEGIN    IF @tp_dias <> '2'      SET @nr_dias = @nr_dias + 1     ELSE      IF (DATEPART(dw, @dt_temp) NOT IN (1, 7)) AND ((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TFERIADO (NOLOCK) WHERE DT_FERIADO = CONVERT(datetime, @dt_temp, 103)) = 0)        SET @nr_dias = @nr_dias + 1        SET @dt_temp = @dt_temp + 1  END    SET @dt_demurrage = @dt_temp - 1    -- Calcular Dias Corridos e a Cobrar  SET @nr_dias_corridos = 0  SET @nr_dias_cobrar   = 0    -- Contar dias e Descontar Sábados, Domingos e Feriados dos Dias Corridos/Cobrar quando necessário  SET @dt_temp = @dt_ini + 1  WHILE CONVERT(DATE, @dt_temp) <> CONVERT(DATE, (@dt_fim + 1))  BEGIN       IF DATEPART(dw, @dt_temp) IN (1, 7) -- Sábado e Domingo      BEGIN   IF @tp_dias <> '2'    BEGIN      SET @nr_dias_corridos = @nr_dias_corridos + 1      IF @dt_temp > @dt_demurrage     SET @nr_dias_cobrar = @nr_dias_cobrar + 1    END   END    ELSE   BEGIN    IF (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TFERIADO (NOLOCK) WHERE DT_FERIADO = CONVERT(datetime, @dt_temp, 103)) > 0 -- Feriado      BEGIN       IF @tp_dias <> '2'        BEGIN       SET @nr_dias_corridos = @nr_dias_corridos + 1       IF @dt_temp > @dt_demurrage         SET @nr_dias_cobrar = @nr_dias_cobrar + 1        END      END      ELSE -- Dia Normal    BEGIN       SET @nr_dias_corridos = @nr_dias_corridos + 1      IF @dt_temp > @dt_demurrage     SET @nr_dias_cobrar = @nr_dias_cobrar + 1    END      END    SET @dt_temp = @dt_temp + 1  END    IF @tp_dias = '3'    SET @nr_dias_corridos = @nr_dias_corridos + 1    /*  SELECT @nr_dias_corridos   SELECT @nr_dias_cobrar       ROLLBACK TRAN  SET XACT_ABORT OFF  --*/

/**/  CREATE PROCEDURE sp_calc_dias_uteis (    @dt_ini datetime,    @nr_dia integer,    @dt_fim datetime OUTPUT  ) AS  --*/  /*  DECLARE    @dt_ini datetime,    @nr_dia integer,    @dt_fim datetime  SET @dt_ini = CONVERT( datetime, '19/12/2006', 103 )  SET @nr_dia = 30  --*/  SET NOCOUNT ON    DECLARE    @dt_temp datetime,    @nr_dia_aux int    SET @dt_temp = @dt_ini  SET @nr_dia_aux = 0    WHILE @nr_dia > @nr_dia_aux  BEGIN    IF (DATEPART(dw, @dt_temp) IN (2,3,4,5,6)) AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TFERIADO (NOLOCK) WHERE DT_FERIADO = CONVERT(datetime, @dt_temp, 103 )) = 0      SET @nr_dia_aux = @nr_dia_aux + 1              SET @dt_temp = @dt_temp + 1  END    SET @dt_fim = @dt_temp  --select @dt_temp  SET NOCOUNT OFF

/**/    CREATE PROCEDURE [DBO].[SP_CALC_DIAS_UTEIS_KPI] (      @TP_DIA CHAR(1),      @DT_INI DATETIME ,      @DT_FIM DATETIME,      @NR_DIA INT OUTPUT    ) AS    --*/    /*    DECLARE      @TP_DIA CHAR(1),      @DT_INI DATETIME,      @DT_FIM DATETIME,      @NR_DIA INT        SET @TP_DIA = '1'    SET @DT_INI = CONVERT( DATETIME, '23/03/2007', 103 )    SET @DT_FIM = CONVERT( DATETIME, '25/03/2007', 103 )    --*/    --SET XACT_ABORT ON    SET NOCOUNT ON        DECLARE @DT_TEMP DATETIME        SET @DT_INI = CONVERT(DATETIME, CONVERT(VARCHAR, @DT_INI, 103),103)    SET @DT_FIM = CONVERT(DATETIME, CONVERT(VARCHAR, @DT_FIM, 103),103)        PRINT 'DATAS'    PRINT @DT_INI    PRINT @DT_FIM        --DIFERENÇA DE DIAS ENTRE A DATA INICIAL E A FINAL    SET @NR_DIA = DATEDIFF( D, @DT_INI, @DT_FIM )        IF @NR_DIA > 0 BEGIN          --QDO A DIFERENÇA DE DIAS FOR MAIOR QUE ZERO      IF @TP_DIA = '1'     BEGIN          SET @DT_TEMP = @DT_INI                WHILE @DT_TEMP <> @DT_FIM + 1      BEGIN        IF DATEPART(WEEKDAY, @DT_TEMP) IN (1, 7)         SET @NR_DIA = @NR_DIA - 1        END                SELECT @NR_DIA = @NR_DIA + COUNT(*)         FROM TFERIADO (NOLOCK)          WHERE DT_FERIADO BETWEEN @DT_FIM AND @DT_INI           AND DATEPART(WEEKDAY, DT_FERIADO) NOT IN (1, 7)      END    END        /*PRINT 'I:'+CONVERT(VARCHAR, @DT_INI, 103)     PRINT 'F:'+ CONVERT(VARCHAR, @DT_FIM, 103)    PRINT 'I:'+CONVERT(VARCHAR, @DT_INI, 103) +' - CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.sp_creatediagram   (    @diagramname  sysname,    @owner_id  int = null,      @version   int,    @definition  varbinary(max)   )   WITH EXECUTE AS 'dbo'   AS   BEGIN    set nocount on       declare @theId int    declare @retval int    declare @IsDbo int    declare @userName sysname    if(@version is null or @diagramname is null)    begin     RAISERROR (N'E_INVALIDARG', 16, 1);     return -1    end       execute as caller;    select @theId = DATABASE_PRINCIPAL_ID();     select @IsDbo = IS_MEMBER(N'db_owner');    revert;         if @owner_id is null    begin     select @owner_id = @theId;    end    else    begin     if @theId <> @owner_id     begin      if @IsDbo = 0      begin       RAISERROR (N'E_INVALIDARG', 16, 1);       return -1      end      select @theId = @owner_id     end    end    -- next 2 line only for test, will be removed after define name unique    if EXISTS(select diagram_id from dbo.sysdiagrams where principal_id = @theId and name = @diagramname)    begin     RAISERROR ('The name is already used.', 16, 1);     return -2    end       insert into dbo.sysdiagrams(name, principal_id , version, definition)      VALUES(@diagramname, @theId, @version, @definition) ;        select @retval = @@IDENTITY     return @retval   END

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.sp_dropdiagram   (    @diagramname  sysname,    @owner_id int = null   )   WITH EXECUTE AS 'dbo'   AS   BEGIN    set nocount on    declare @theId    int    declare @IsDbo    int        declare @UIDFound   int    declare @DiagId   int       if(@diagramname is null)    begin     RAISERROR ('Invalid value', 16, 1);     return -1    end       EXECUTE AS CALLER;    select @theId = DATABASE_PRINCIPAL_ID();    select @IsDbo = IS_MEMBER(N'db_owner');     if(@owner_id is null)     select @owner_id = @theId;    REVERT;         select @DiagId = diagram_id, @UIDFound = principal_id from dbo.sysdiagrams where principal_id = @owner_id and name = @diagramname     if(@DiagId IS NULL or (@IsDbo = 0 and @UIDFound <> @theId))    begin     RAISERROR ('Diagram does not exist or you do not have permission.', 16, 1)     return -3    end       delete from dbo.sysdiagrams where diagram_id = @DiagId;       return 0;   END

/************************* ESTATISTICAS - RELATORIOS *******************************/    /*    OBJETIVO: Criar relatórios de estatisticas de utilização dos relatórios por usuário.        Autor: Alexandre Gonçalves Neto    Criado: 22/09/2006        Manutenção:    */    /**/    CREATE PROCEDURE sp_estat_menu_user (      @cd_mes integer,      @cd_ano integer    ) AS    --*/    /*    SET XACT_ABORT ON    BEGIN TRAN        DECLARE      @cd_mes integer,      @cd_ano integer        SET @cd_mes = 8    SET @cd_ano = 2006    --*/    --cria estatisticas por menu    CREATE TABLE #TESTATISCA_MENU (      CD_MENU char(2),      CD_SUBM char(2),      CD_USUARIO char(4),      VL_TOTAL integer DEFAULT(0),      VL_CHEIO integer DEFAULT(0),      VL_VAZIO integer DEFAULT(0),      VL_PER_CHEIO float    )    --seleciona o total de consultas    INSERT INTO #TESTATISCA_MENU ( VL_TOTAL, CD_MENU, CD_SUBM, CD_USUARIO )    SELECT COUNT(*), R.CD_MENU, R.CD_SUBM, R.CD_USUARIO    FROM TRELATORIOS R (NOLOCK)    WHERE DATEPART(mm, R.DT_EMISSAO) = @cd_mes      AND DATEPART(yy, R.DT_EMISSAO) = @cd_ano    GROUP BY R.CD_MENU, R.CD_SUBM, R.CD_USUARIO        --seleciona o total de consultas que obtiveram resultados    UPDATE #TESTATISCA_MENU SET      VL_CHEIO = ISNULL(R.VL_TOTAL, 0)    FROM (  SELECT COUNT(*) AS VL_TOTAL, CD_MENU, CD_SUBM, CD_USUARIO            FROM TRELATORIOS (NOLOCK)            WHERE IN_DADOS = '1'              AND DATEPART(mm, DT_EMISSAO) = @cd_mes              AND DATEPART(yy, DT_EMISSAO) = @cd_ano            GROUP BY CD_MENU, CD_SUBM, CD_USUARIO      ) R, #TESTATISCA_MENU E    WHERE R.CD_MENU = E.CD_MENU      AND R.CD_SUBM = E.CD_SUBM      AND R.CD_USUARIO = E.CD_USUARIO        --seleciona o total de consultas que não obtiveram resultados    UPDATE #TESTATISCA_MENU SET      VL_VAZIO = ISNULL(R.VL_TOTAL, 0)    FROM (  SELECT COUNT(*) AS VL_TOTAL, CD_MENU, CD_SUBM, CD_USUARIO            FROM TRELATORIOS (NOLOCK)            WHERE IN_DADOS = '0'              AND DATEPART(mm, DT_EMISSAO) = @cd_mes              AND DATEPART(yy, DT_EMISSAO) = @cd_ano            GROUP BY CD_MENU, CD_SUBM, CD_USUARIO      ) R, #TESTATISCA_MENU E    WHERE R.CD_MENU = E.CD_MENU      AND R.CD_SUBM = E.CD_SUBM      AND R.CD_USUARIO = E.CD_USUARIO        --verifica se já existem registros para o ano/mes corrente    IF (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM M15_ESTAT_MENU (NOLOCK) WHERE M15_NR_ANO = @cd_ano AND M15_NR_MES = @cd_mes) > 0    BEGIN      --apaga os registros e re-calcula      DELETE M15_ESTAT_MENU WHERE M15_NR_ANO = @cd_ano AND M15_NR_MES = @cd_mes    END    --insere na tabela de estatistica    INSERT INTO M15_ESTAT_MENU (      M15_NR_ANO, M15_NR_MES, M15_CD_MENU, M15_CD_SUBM, M15_CD_USUARIO, M15_CD_CARGO, M15_CD_GRUPO,      M15_VL_TOTAL, M15_VL_CHEIO, M15_VL_VAZIO, M15_VL_PER_CHEIO    )    SELECT       @cd_ano, @cd_mes, E.CD_MENU, E.CD_SUBM, E.CD_USUARIO, U.CD_CARGO,      CASE         WHEN U.CD_CARGO IN ('040','055','060') THEN          (            SELECT TOP 1 GC.CD_GRUPO            FROM TPERMISSAO PC (NOLOCK),                TEMPRESA_NAC EN (NOLOCK),                TGRUPO GC (NOLOCK)            WHERE PC.CD_USUARIO = E.CD_USUARIO              AND PC.CD_CLIENTE = EN.CD_EMPRESA              AND EN.CD_GRUPO   = GC.CD_GRUPO            GROUP BY GC.CD_GRUPO            ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC          )      END,      E.VL_TOTAL, E.VL_CHEIO, E.VL_VAZIO, ((VL_CHEIO * 100) / VL_TOTAL)    FROM #TESTATISCA_MENU E,        TUSUARIO U (NOLOCK)    WHERE E.CD_USUARIO = U.CD_USUARIO        DROP TABLE #TESTATISCA_MENU        /*------------------------------------------------------------------------------*/    --cria estatisticas por usuário    DECLARE      @cd_menu   char(2),      @cd_subm   char(2),      @nm_coluna char(16),      @tx_update nvarchar(1024)        --verifica se já existem registros para o ano/mes corrente    IF (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM M16_ESTAT_USER (nolock) WHERE M16_NR_ANO = @cd_ano AND M16_NR_MES = @cd_mes) > 0    BEGIN      --apaga os registros e re-calcula      DELETE M16_ESTAT_USER WHERE M16_NR_ANO = @cd_ano AND M16_NR_MES = @cd_mes    END        --insere os valores padão de ano, mes, usuário, cargo/grupo e total    INSERT INTO M16_ESTAT_USER (M16_NR_ANO, M16_NR_MES, M16_CD_USUARIO, M16_CD_CARGO, M16_CD_GRUPO, M16_VL_TOTAL)    SELECT @cd_ano, @cd_mes, E.CD_USUARIO, U.CD_CARGO,      CASE         WHEN U.CD_CARGO IN ('040','055','060') THEN          (            SELECT TOP 1 GC.CD_GRUPO            FROM TPERMISSAO PC (NOLOCK),                TEMPRESA_NAC EN (NOLOCK),                TGRUPO GC (NOLOCK)            WHERE PC.CD_USUARIO = E.CD_USUARIO              AND PC.CD_CLIENTE = EN.CD_EMPRESA              AND EN.CD_GRUPO   = GC.CD_GRUPO            GROUP BY GC.CD_GRUPO            ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC          )      END, COUNT(*)    FROM TRELATORIOS E (NOLOCK),        TUSUARIO U (NOLOCK)    WHERE DATEPART(mm, E.DT_EMISSAO) = @cd_mes      AND DATEPART(yy, E.DT_EMISSAO) = @cd_ano      AND E.CD_USUARIO = U.CD_USUARIO    GROUP BY E.CD_USUARIO, U.CD_CARGO        --cria um cursor com os menus existentes    DECLARE cMenu CURSOR LOCAL FOR      SELECT M02_CD_MENU, M02_CD_SUBM      FROM M02_SUBM (NOLOCK)      WHERE M02_IN_VIEW  = 1        OPEN cMenu    FETCH cMenu INTO @cd_menu, @cd_subm        WHILE @@fetch_status = 0    BEGIN      --cria o nome da coluna      SET @nm_coluna = 'M16_VL_MENU_'+@cd_menu+@cd_subm            --verfica se a coluna já existe, se não cria na tabela      IF (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM myindaia.dbo.sysobjects tb (NOLOCK)            INNER JOIN myindaia.dbo.syscolumns co (NOLOCK) ON tb.id = co.id          WHERE tb.name = 'M16_ESTAT_USER' AND co.name = @nm_coluna ) = 0      BEGIN        EXEC ('ALTER TABLE M16_ESTAT_USER ADD '+@nm_coluna+' integer DEFAULT (0) NULL')      END            --atualiza a qtde de consultas por usuário/menu       SET @tx_update = '      UPDATE M16_ESTAT_USER SET        '+@nm_coluna+' = ISNULL(R.VL_TOTAL, 0)      FROM (  SELECT COUNT(*) AS VL_TOTAL, CD_USUARIO              FROM TRELATORIOS (NOLOCK)              WHERE DATEPART(mm, DT_EMISSAO) = '+ CAST(@cd_mes AS varchar) +'                AND DATEPART(yy, DT_EMISSAO) = '+ CAST(@cd_ano AS varchar) +'                AND CD_MENU = '''+ @cd_menu +'''                AND CD_SUBM = '''+ @cd_subm +'''              GROUP BY CD_USUARIO        ) R, M16_ESTAT_USER E      WHERE R.CD_USUARIO = E.M16_CD_USUARIO        AND M16_NR_MES   = '+ CAST(@cd_mes AS varchar) +'        AND M16_NR_ANO   = '+ CAST(@cd_ano AS varchar)      EXEC(@tx_update)            FETCH cMenu INTO @cd_menu, @cd_subm    END        CLOSE cMenu    DEALLOCATE cMenu    /*    SELECT * FROM M15_ESTAT_MENU (NOLOCK) WHERE M15_NR_ANO = @cd_ano AND M15_NR_MES = @cd_mes    SELECT * FROM M16_ESTAT_USER (NOLOCK) WHERE M16_NR_ANO = @cd_ano AND M16_NR_MES = @cd_mes        ROLLBACK TRAN    SET XACT_ABORT ON    --*/

/**/  CREATE PROCEDURE sp_estat_total_geral (    @vl_total_ano     integer output,    @vl_total_mes     integer output,    @vl_total_sem     integer output,    @vl_total_dia     integer output,    @vl_total_ano_ant integer output,    @vl_total_mes_ant integer output,    @vl_total_sem_ant integer output,    @vl_total_dia_ant integer output,    @vl_top_dia       integer output,    @dt_top_dia       datetime output  ) AS  --*/  /*  DECLARE    @vl_total_ano int,    @vl_total_mes int,    @vl_total_sem int,    @vl_total_dia int,    @vl_total_ano_ant int,    @vl_total_mes_ant int,    @vl_total_sem_ant int,    @vl_total_dia_ant int,    @vl_top_dia int,    @dt_top_dia datetime  --*/  DECLARE    @hoje datetime,    @wday integer    --seleciona o dia da semana  SET @hoje = CONVERT(datetime, CONVERT(varchar(10), GETDATE(), 103), 103)  SET @wday = DATEPART(dw, GETDATE())    --seleciona o total de consultas do ano corrente  SELECT @vl_total_ano = COUNT(*)  FROM TRELATORIOS (NOLOCK)  WHERE IN_DADOS = '1'    AND DATEPART(yyyy, DT_EMISSAO) = YEAR(@hoje)    --seleciona o total de consultas do mes corrente  SELECT @vl_total_mes = COUNT(*)  FROM TRELATORIOS (NOLOCK)  WHERE IN_DADOS = '1'    AND DATEPART(yyyy, DT_EMISSAO) = YEAR(@hoje)    AND DATEPART(m, DT_EMISSAO)    = MONTH(@hoje)    --seleciona o total de consultas da semana corrente  SELECT @vl_total_sem = COUNT(*)  FROM TRELATORIOS (NOLOCK)  WHERE IN_DADOS = '1'    AND DT_EMISSAO BETWEEN DATEADD(Day, -(@wday-1), @hoje) AND @hoje    --seleciona o total de consultas do dia  SELECT @vl_total_dia = COUNT(*)  FROM TRELATORIOS (NOLOCK)  WHERE IN_DADOS = '1'    AND DT_EMISSAO = @hoje    /* ANO, MES e SEMANA PASSADOS */    --seleciona o total de consultas do ano passado  SELECT @vl_total_ano_ant = COUNT(*)  FROM TRELATORIOS (NOLOCK)  WHERE IN_DADOS = '1'    AND DATEPART(yyyy, DT_EMISSAO) = YEAR(@hoje)-1    --seleciona o total de consultas do mes passado  IF MONTH(@hoje) = 1  BEGIN    SELECT @vl_total_mes_ant = COUNT(*)    FROM TRELATORIOS (NOLOCK)    WHERE IN_DADOS = '1'      AND DATEPART(yyyy, DT_EMISSAO) = YEAR(@hoje)-1      AND DATEPART(m, DT_EMISSAO)    = 12  END  ELSE  BEGIN    SELECT @vl_total_mes_ant = COUNT(*)    FROM TRELATORIOS (NOLOCK)    WHERE IN_DADOS = '1'      AND DATEPART(yyyy, DT_EMISSAO) = YEAR(@hoje)      AND DATEPART(m, DT_EMISSAO)    = MONTH(@hoje)-1  END    --seleciona o total de consultas da semana passada  SELECT @vl_total_sem_ant = COUNT(*)  FROM TRELATORIOS (NOLOCK)  WHERE IN_DADOS = '1'    AND DT_EMISSAO BETWEEN DATEADD(Day, -(@wday+6), @hoje) AND DATEADD(Day, -@wday, @hoje)    --seleciona o total de consultas de ontem  SELECT @vl_total_dia_ant = COUNT(*)  FROM TRELATORIOS (NOLOCK)  WHERE IN_DADOS = '1'    AND DT_EMISSAO = DATEADD(Day, -1, @hoje)    --seleciona o dia que mais consultas foram realizadas  SELECT TOP 1 @vl_top_dia = COUNT(*), @dt_top_dia = DT_EMISSAO  FROM TRELATORIOS (NOLOCK)  WHERE IN_DADOS = '1'  GROUP BY DT_EMISSAO  ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC    /*  SELECT    @vl_total_ano AS ANO,    @vl_total_mes AS MES,    @vl_total_sem AS SEM,    @vl_total_dia AS DIA,    @vl_total_ano_ant AS ANO_A,    @vl_total_mes_ant AS MES_A,    @vl_total_sem_ant AS SEM_A,    @vl_total_dia_ant AS DIA_A,    @vl_top_dia AS VL_DIA_TOP,    @dt_top_dia AS DT_DIA_TOP  --*/

-- =============================================  -- Author:  <Author,,Name>  -- Create date: <Create Date,,>  -- Description: <Description,,>  -- =============================================  CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[sp_fat_rateio_myindaia_imp] (  @cd_un

NOME_PROCEDURE: item_area = @acoxambro               IF NOT EXISTS( SELECT *                           FROM TFAT_CALCULO_RATEIO_DESP (NOLOCK)                           WHERE CD_UNID_NEG    = @cd_unid_neg                             AND CD_PRODUTO     = @cd_produto                             AND NR_SOLICITACAO = @nr_solicitacao                             AND NR_PROCESSO    = @nr_processo                             AND CD_REFERENCIA  = @cd_referencia                             AND CD_ITEM        = @cd_item_tmp                               AND CD_AREA        = @cd_area_tmp )            BEGIN              INSERT TFAT_CALCULO_RATEIO_DESP( CD_UNID_NEG, CD_PRODUTO, NR_SOLICITACAO, NR_PROCESSO, CD_REFERENCIA, CD_ITEM,                 CD_AREA, VL_ITEM, VL_ITEM_AREA, TP_RATEIO_DESP, NR_NOTA_FATURA )              VALUES ( @cd_unid_neg, @cd_produto, @nr_solicitacao, @nr_processo_tmp, @cd_referencia_tmp, @cd_item_tmp,                @cd_area_tmp, @vl_item, @vl_item_area, @tp_rateio_desp, @nr_nota_fatura )            END          END        END           FETCH cItemArea INTO  @nr_processo_tmp, @cd_referencia_tmp, @cd_item_tmp, @cd_area_tmp, @qt_mercadoria, @pl_item_area, @in_li, @nr_oper_trat_prev      END      SET @contador = 1      CLOSE cItemArea      DEALLOCATE cItemArea      DROP TABLE #TMP_QUANTIDADE    END      FETCH cItem INTO @nr_processo, @cd_item, @vl_item, @nr_nota_fatura   END    CLOSE cItem  DEALLOCATE cItem    /*****  Nº DE PEDIDOS - TP_RATEIO_DESP = 7  *****/  SELECT @tp_rateio_desp = IA.TP_RATEIO_DESP  FROM #TMP_ITEM_AREA IA (NOLOCK)    INNER JOIN #TMP_REFERENCIA   tmpRC ON (tmpRC.CD_AREA = IA.CD_AREA)    INNER JOIN #TMP_ITENS_FATURA tmpIF ON (tmpIF.NR_PROCESSO = tmpRC.NR_PROCESSO)  WHERE IA.TP_RATEIO_DESP = '7'    AND IA.CD_ITEM IN ( SELECT CD_ITEM FROM #TMP_ITENS_FATURA )    AND IA.CD_AREA IN ( SELECT CD_AREA FROM #TMP_REFERENCIA )    IF @tp_rateio_desp = '7'  BEGIN    SELECT tmpIF.NR_PROCESSO, tmpRC.CD_REFERENCIA, IA.CD_ITEM, IA.CD_AREA, MIN(tmpIF.VL_ITEM) AS VL_ITEM,      tmpIF.NR_NOTA_FATURA, IA.IN_LI, MAX(AD.NR_OPER_TRAT_PREV) AS NR_OPER_TRAT_PREV    INTO #TMP_PEDIDO    FROM #TMP_ITEM_AREA IA (NOLOCK)      INNER JOIN #TMP_REFERENCIA   tmpRC ON (tmpRC.CD_AREA = IA.CD_AREA)      INNER JOIN #TMP_ITENS_FATURA tmpIF ON (tmpIF.CD_ITEM = IA.CD_ITEM)      INNER JOIN TADICAO_DE_IMPORTACAO AD (NOLOCK) ON (AD.NR_PROCESSO = tmpRC.NR_PROCESSO)    WHERE IA.TP_RATEIO_DESP = '7'      AND IA.CD_ITEM IN ( SELECT CD_ITEM FROM #TMP_ITENS_FATURA )      AND IA.CD_AREA IN ( SELECT CD_AREA FROM #TMP_REFERENCIA )      AND ( ( ( IA.IN_LI = 1 ) AND ( AD.NR_OPER_TRAT_PREV <> '' ) ) OR             ( ( ( IA.IN_LI = 0 ) AND ( AD.NR_OPER_TRAT_PREV = ''  ) ) OR ( ( IA.IN_LI = 0 ) AND ( AD.NR_OPER_TRAT_PREV <> ''  ) ) ) )      --AND ( AD.NR_OPER_TRAT_PREV = ''  ) ) ) DEIXADO COMO COMENTARIO POR HAVER PROCESSOS COM IN_LI=0 E NR_OPER_TRAT_PREV<>'' ASS.: TAISA - 06/08/03    GROUP BY tmpIF.NR_PROCESSO, tmpRC.CD_REFERENCIA, IA.CD_ITEM, IA.CD_AREA, tmpIF.NR_NOTA_FATURA, IA.IN_LI    ORDER BY tmpIF.NR_PROCESSO, IA.CD_AREA      DECLARE cPedido CURSOR FOR      SELECT tmpNP.NR_PROCESSO, tmpNP.CD_ITEM, tmpRC.CD_AREA, tmpNP.VL_ITEM      FROM #TMP_PEDIDO tmpNP        INNER JOIN #TMP_REFERENCIA tmpRC ON (tmpRC.NR_PROCESSO = tmpNP.NR_PROCESSO)      WHERE tmpNP.CD_ITEM IN ( SELECT CD_ITEM FROM #TMP_ITENS_FATURA )        AND tmpNP.CD_AREA IN ( SELECT CD_AREA FROM #TMP_REFERENCIA )      GROUP BY tmpNP.NR_PROCESSO, tmpNP.CD_ITEM, tmpRC.CD_AREA, tmpNP.VL_ITEM      OPEN cPedido    FETCH cPedido INTO @nr_processo, @cd_item, @cd_area, @vl_item      WHILE @@fetch_status = 0    BEGIN      SET @contador     = 0        SET @acoxambro    = @vl_item      SET @vl_item_area = 0        SELECT @count = COUNT(CD_REFERENCIA)      FROM #TMP_PEDIDO        WHERE CD_ITEM = @cd_item         AND NR_PROCESSO = @nr_processo        DECLARE cItemArea CURSOR FOR        SELECT CD_REFERENCIA, CD_ITEM, CD_AREA, VL_ITEM        FROM #TMP_PEDIDO        WHERE CD_ITEM = @cd_item          AND NR_PROCESSO = @nr_processo        GROUP BY CD_REFERENCIA, CD_ITEM, CD_AREA, VL_ITEM       OPEN cItemArea      FETCH cItemArea INTO @cd_referencia_tmp, @cd_item_tmp, @cd_area_tmp, @vl_item_tmp        WHILE @@fetch_status = 0      BEGIN        IF @contador <> @count - 1        BEGIN          SET @vl_item_area = ROUND( ( @vl_item_tmp / ( @count ) ), 2 )          SET @acoxambro = ROUND( ( @acoxambro - @vl_item_area ), 2 )            IF NOT EXISTS( SELECT *                         FROM TFAT_CALCULO_RATEIO_DESP (NOLOCK)                         WHERE CD_UNID_NEG    = @cd_unid_neg                           AND CD_PRODUTO     = @cd_produto                           AND NR_SOLICITACAO = @nr_solicitacao                           AND NR_PROCESSO    = @nr_processo                           AND CD_REFERENCIA  = @cd_referencia_tmp                           AND CD_ITEM        = @cd_item_tmp                             AND CD_AREA        = @cd_area_tmp )          BEGIN            INSERT TFAT_CALCULO_RATEIO_DESP( CD_UNID_NEG, CD_PRODUTO, NR_SOLICITACAO, NR_PROCESSO, CD_REFERENCIA, CD_ITEM,               CD_AREA, VL_ITEM, VL_ITEM_AREA, TP_RATEIO_DESP, NR_NOTA_FATURA)            SELECT @cd_unid_neg, @cd_produto, @nr_solicitacao, @nr_processo, @cd_referencia_tmp, CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.sp_helpdiagramdefinition   (    @diagramname  sysname,    @owner_id int = null      )   WITH EXECUTE AS N'dbo'   AS   BEGIN    set nocount on      declare @theId   int    declare @IsDbo   int    declare @DiagId  int    declare @UIDFound int       if(@diagramname is null)    begin     RAISERROR (N'E_INVALIDARG', 16, 1);     return -1    end       execute as caller;    select @theId = DATABASE_PRINCIPAL_ID();    select @IsDbo = IS_MEMBER(N'db_owner');    if(@owner_id is null)     select @owner_id = @theId;    revert;        select @DiagId = diagram_id, @UIDFound = principal_id from dbo.sysdiagrams where principal_id = @owner_id and name = @diagramname;    if(@DiagId IS NULL or (@IsDbo = 0 and @UIDFound <> @theId ))    begin     RAISERROR ('Diagram does not exist or you do not have permission.', 16, 1);     return -3    end      select version, definition FROM dbo.sysdiagrams where diagram_id = @DiagId ;     return 0   END

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.sp_helpdiagrams   (    @diagramname sysname = NULL,    @owner_id int = NULL   )   WITH EXECUTE AS N'dbo'   AS   BEGIN    DECLARE @user sysname    DECLARE @dboLogin bit    EXECUTE AS CALLER;     SET @user = USER_NAME();     SET @dboLogin = CONVERT(bit,IS_MEMBER('db_owner'));    REVERT;    SELECT     [Database] = DB_NAME(),     [Name] = name,     [ID] = diagram_id,     [Owner] = USER_NAME(principal_id),     [OwnerID] = principal_id    FROM     sysdiagrams    WHERE     (@dboLogin = 1 OR USER_NAME(principal_id) = @user) AND     (@diagramname IS NULL OR name = @diagramname) AND     (@owner_id IS NULL OR principal_id = @owner_id)    ORDER BY     4, 5, 1   END

CREATE PROCEDURE   [dbo].[sp_Importacao_Custeio] (      @nr_processo char(14),  @vl_tot_nao_tributavel   float  output,  @vl_sub_tot_tributavel float  output,  @vl_comissao float  output ,  @vl_tot_geral float  output  ) AS     DECLARE @erro int   SET @vl_tot_nao_tributavel = 0  SET @vl_sub_tot_tributavel = 0  SET @vl_comissao = 0  SET @vl_tot_geral = 0      SELECT @vl_tot_nao_tributavel =         ISNULL( ROUND( SUM(         CASE IN_RESTITUI            WHEN '0' THEN ( ISNULL( FI.VL_ITEM, 0 ) + ISNULL( FI.VL_ASSIST, 0 ) - ISNULL( FI.VL_IR, 0 ) )           WHEN '1' THEN ( ISNULL( FI.VL_ITEM, 0 ) + ISNULL( FI.VL_ASSIST, 0 ) - ISNULL( FI.VL_IR, 0 ) ) * (-1)         END ), 2 ), 0 )    FROM   TFATURAMENTO_CC FI, TITEM I (NOLOCK)  WHERE  FI.CD_ITEM = I.CD_ITEM AND         I.IN_TRIBUTAVEL = '0' AND         FI.IN_CANCELADO = '0' AND         SUBSTRING(FI.NR_PROCESSO,1,2) = '01' AND         SUBSTRING(FI.NR_PROCESSO,3,2) = '01' AND         FI.NR_PROCESSO = @nr_processo   and         ISNULL( FI.CD_ITEM_NAO_FAT, '' ) <> '*'  AND         FI.CD_ITEM NOT IN (991,992,993,995,996,998,997,988,987,128,994,578,822,990,989)    --select CD_ITEM_RECEB_NUM, CD_ITEM_DEVOL_NUM, CD_ITEM_EXTOR_NUM, CD_ITEM_SALDO_CRE,CD_ITEM_SALDO_DEB,   --CD_ITEM_RECEB_SD , CD_ITEM_PAGTO_SD , CD_ITEM_EXT_RECEB,CD_ITEM_EXT_PAGTO, CD_ITEM_NAO_FAT,  CD_ITEM_IR       ,   --CD_ITEM_COFINS_RETENCAO,CD_ITEM_COMISSAO , CD_ITEM_PAGO_CLI , CD_ITEM_PIS_COFINS  from TPARAMETROS    /*-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------*/    /*VL_SUB_TOT_TRIBUTAVEL (2)*/    SELECT @vl_sub_tot_tributavel =         ISNULL( ROUND( SUM(         CASE IN_RESTITUI            WHEN '0' THEN ( ISNULL( FI.VL_ITEM, 0 ) + ISNULL( FI.VL_ASSIST, 0 ) - ISNULL( FI.VL_IR, 0 ) )           WHEN '1' THEN ( ISNULL( FI.VL_ITEM, 0 ) + ISNULL( FI.VL_ASSIST, 0 ) - ISNULL( FI.VL_IR, 0 ) ) * (-1)         END ), 2 ), 0 )   FROM   TFATURAMENTO_CC FI, TITEM I (NOLOCK)  WHERE  FI.CD_ITEM = I.CD_ITEM AND         I.IN_TRIBUTAVEL = '1' AND         FI.IN_CANCELADO = '0' AND        SUBSTRING(FI.NR_PROCESSO,1,2) = '01' AND        SUBSTRING(FI.NR_PROCESSO,3,2) = '01' AND         --FI.NR_SOLIC_FAT = @nr_solicitacao AND         FI.NR_PROCESSO = @nr_processo  and         ISNULL( FI.CD_ITEM_NAO_FAT, '' ) <> '*' AND         FI.CD_ITEM NOT IN (991,992,993,995,996,998,997,988,987,128,994,578,822,990,989)    --select CD_ITEM_RECEB_NUM, CD_ITEM_DEVOL_NUM, CD_ITEM_EXTOR_NUM, CD_ITEM_SALDO_CRE,     --   CD_ITEM_SALDO_DEB, CD_ITEM_RECEB_SD,  CD_ITEM_PAGTO_SD,  CD_ITEM_EXT_RECEB,      --   CD_ITEM_EXT_PAGTO, CD_ITEM_NAO_FAT  , CD_ITEM_IR       , CD_ITEM_COFINS_RETENCAO,     --   CD_ITEM_COMISSAO , CD_ITEM_PAGO_CLI , CD_ITEM_PIS_COFINS  --from TPARAMETROS    EXEC @erro= sp_calc_comissao @nr_processo,@vl_comissao output     If @erro>0 return (@erro)    /*-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------    SELECT @vl_comissao =  ISNULL( ROUND( SUM(         CASE IN_RESTITUI            WHEN '0' THEN ( ISNULL( FI.VL_ITEM, 0 ) + ISNULL( FI.VL_ASSIST, 0 ) - ISNULL( FI.VL_IR, 0 ) )           WHEN '1' THEN ( ISNULL( FI.VL_ITEM, 0 ) + ISNULL( FI.VL_ASSIST, 0 ) - ISNULL( FI.VL_IR, 0 ) ) * (-1)         END ), 2 ), 0 )  FROM   TFATURAMENTO_CC FI (NOLOCK), TITEM I (NOLOCK)  WHERE  FI.CD_ITEM = I.CD_ITEM AND         FI.IN_CANCELADO = '0' AND   SUBSTRING(FI.NR_PROCESSO,1,2) = '01' AND   SUBSTRING(FI.NR_PROCESSO,3,2) = '01' AND         FI.NR_PROCESSO =  @nr_processo  and  --       FI.NR_SOLIC_FAT = @nr_solicitacao AND         FI.CD_ITEM = ( 822)    --select CD_ITEM_COMISSAO from TPARAMETROS    -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------*/    /*VL_TOT_GERAL (4)*/  --SET  @vl_tot_geral      = ISNULL( @vl_tot_nao_tributavel, 0 ) + ISNULL( @vl_sub_tot_tributavel, 0 ) + ISNULL( @vl_comissao, 0 )  SELECT  @vl_tot_geral      = @vl_tot_nao_tributavel +  @vl_sub_tot_tributavel + @vl_comissao    /*-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------*/    --print @vl_tot_nao_tributavel   --print @vl_sub_tot_tributavel  --print @vl_comissao
