(012)Presença Carga / Mantra      IF ISDATE(@dtEv161) = 1 AND ISDATE(@dtEv012) = 1 BEGIN        EXEC sp_calc_dias_uteis_kpi @in_dias_util, @dtEv161, @dtEv012, @vlDifDias OUTPUT        SET @txUpdate = @txUpdate+' NR_ETA_X_PRES_CARGA = '+CAST(@vlDifDias as varchar)+', '      END      -- 4: ETA(161) vs (050)Emissão de L.I.      IF ISDATE(@dtEv161) = 1 AND ISDATE(@dtEv050) = 1 BEGIN        EXEC sp_calc_dias_uteis_kpi @in_dias_util, @dtEv161, @dtEv050, @vlDifDias OUTPUT        SET @txUpdate = @txUpdate+' NR_ETA_X_EMISSAO_LI = '+CAST(@vlDifDias as varchar)+', '      END      -- 5: ETA(161) vs (437)Recepção de Doctos. Originais      IF ISDATE(@dtEv161) = 1 AND ISDATE(@dtEv045) = 1 BEGIN        EXEC sp_calc_dias_uteis_kpi @in_dias_util, @dtEv161, @dtEv045, @vlDifDias OUTPUT        SET @txUpdate = @txUpdate+' NR_ETA_X_DOCS_ORIG_OD = '+CAST(@vlDifDias as varchar)+', '      END      -- 6: Emissão de L.I.(050) vs (397)Deferimento de L.I.      IF ISDATE(@dtEv050) = 1 AND ISDATE(@dtEv397) = 1 BEGIN        EXEC sp_calc_dias_uteis_kpi @in_dias_util, @dtEv050, @dtEv397, @vlDifDias OUTPUT        SET @txUpdate = @txUpdate+' NR_EMISSAO_LI_X_DEF_LI = '+CAST(@vlDifDias as varchar)+', '      END      -- 7: Deferimento de L.I.(397) vs (021)Registro DI/DA SISCOMEX      IF ISDATE(@dtEv397) = 1 AND ISDATE(@dtEv021) = 1 BEGIN        EXEC sp_calc_dias_uteis_kpi @in_dias_util, @dtEv397, @dtEv021, @vlDifDias OUTPUT        SET @txUpdate = @txUpdate+' NR_DEF_LI_X_REG_DI = '+CAST(@vlDifDias as varchar)+', '      END      -- 8: Registro DI/DA SISCOMEX(021) vs (088)Desembaraço      IF ISDATE(@dtEv021) = 1 AND ISDATE(@dtEv088) = 1 BEGIN        EXEC sp_calc_dias_uteis_kpi @in_dias_util, @dtEv021, @dtEv088, @vlDifDias OUTPUT        SET @txUpdate = @txUpdate+' NR_REG_DI_X_DESEMBARACO = '+CAST(@vlDifDias as varchar)+', '      END      -- 9: ETA(161) vs (088)Desembaraço      IF ISDATE(@dtEv161) = 1 AND ISDATE(@dtEv088) = 1 BEGIN        EXEC sp_calc_dias_uteis_kpi @in_dias_util, @dtEv161, @dtEv088, @vlDifDias OUTPUT        SET @txUpdate = @txUpdate+' NR_ETA_X_DESEMBARACO = '+CAST(@vlDifDias as varchar)+', '      END      -- 10: Desembaraço(088) vs (041)Envio de Nota Fiscal ao Transportador      IF ISDATE(@dtEv088) = 1 AND ISDATE(@dtEv041) = 1 BEGIN        EXEC sp_calc_dias_uteis_kpi @in_dias_util, @dtEv088, @dtEv041, @vlDifDias OUTPUT        SET @txUpdate = @txUpdate+' NR_DESEMBARACO_X_DOCS_TRANSP = '+CAST(@vlDifDias as varchar)+', '      END      -- 11: Envio de Nota Fiscal ao Transportador(041) vs ()Devolução Contâiner      IF ISDATE(@dtEv041) = 1 AND ISDATE(@dtDevCntr) = 1 BEGIN        EXEC sp_calc_dias_uteis_kpi @in_dias_util, @dtEv041, @dtDevCntr, @vlDifDias OUTPUT        SET @txUpdate = @txUpdate+' NR_DOCS_TRANSP_X_RETORNO_CNTR = '+CAST(@vlDifDias as varchar)+', '      END      -- 12: Envio de Nota Fiscal ao Transportador(041) vs (166)Trans. do Pedido no SAP      IF ISDATE(@dtEv041) = 1 AND ISDATE(@dtEv166) = 1 BEGIN        EXEC sp_calc_dias_uteis_kpi @in_dias_util, @dtEv041, @dtEv166, @vlDifDias OUTPUT        SET @txUpdate = @txUpdate+' NR_DOCS_TRANSP_X_PEDIDO_SAP = '+CAST(@vlDifDias as varchar)+', '      END      -- 13: ETA(161) vs (166)Trans. do Pedido no SAP      IF ISDATE(@dtEv161) = 1 AND ISDATE(@dtEv166) = 1 BEGIN        EXEC sp_calc_dias_uteis_kpi @in_dias_util, @dtEv161, @dtEv166, @vlDifDias OUTPUT        SET @txUpdate = @txUpdate+' NR_ETA_X_PEDIDO_SAP = '+CAST(@vlDifDias as varchar)+', '      END      -- 14: ETA(161) vs (041)Envio da NF a Transportadora      IF ISDATE(@dtEv161) = 1 AND ISDATE(@dtEv041) = 1 BEGIN        EXEC sp_calc_dias_uteis_kpi @in_dias_util, @dtEv161, @dtEv041, @vlDifDias OUTPUT        SET @txUpdate = @txUpdate+' NR_ETA_X_ENVIO_NF_TRANS = '+CAST(@vlDifDias as varchar)+', '      END      --executa a query      SET @txUpdate = LEFT(@txUpdate, LEN(@txUpdate)-1)+'FROM TREL_IMP_KPI (NOLOCK)        WHERE CD_USUARIO = '''+@cd_usuario+'''          AND NR_IDENT = '+CAST(@nr_ident as char)+'          AND NR_PROCESSO = '''+@nrProcesso+''' '      --print @txUpdate      exec(@txUpdate)      DELETE FROM #TMP_KPI_DATA WHERE NR_PROCESSO = @nrProcesso    END  END    --armazena no controle de relatórios emitidos  INSERT INTO TRELATORIOS (    CD_MENU, CD_SUBM, CD_USUARIO, CD_VIEW, NR_IDENT, DT_EMISSAO, HR_EMISSAO, IN_DADOS, IN_ATIVO, TX_FILTRO  )  VALUES (    @cd_menu, @cd_subm, @cd_usuario, @cd_view, ISNULL(@nr_ident, 0),    CONVERT(datetime, CONVERT(varchar(10), GETDATE(), 103), 103), GETDATE(), @in_dados, '1', @relatorio  ) @dt_ini+''',103) AND CONVERT(datetime,'''+@dt_fim+''',103) '      --somente será pesquisado o evento que for aplicavel      SET @sql_w = @sql_w+' AND ISNULL( F'+@tx_cont+'.IN_APLICAVEL, ''0'' ) = ''1'' '    END    ELSE    BEGIN      IF @cd_filtro IN ('0005','0006','0007','0008','0032')      BEGIN        --inclui o grupo de cliente ou empresa        IF @cd_filtro IN ('0005','0006')        BEGIN          --seleciona os códigos de cliente e área de acordo com o cargo do usuário          IF ( SELECT @cd_cargo ) IN ( '040','055','060' )          BEGIN            IF (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TPERMISSAO P WHERE P.CD_USUARIO = @cd_usuario) > 0       BEGIN            --seleciona as empresas que o cliente tem acesso              INSERT INTO #TMP_EMPRESA ( CD_EMPRESA )              SELECT                AND ( E.CD_EMPRESA <> '00001' )                AND ( @tx_filtro   IN ( CD_GRUPO  , 'X' ) OR @tx_filtro IN ( CD_EMPRESA, 'X' ) )                          SET @sql_w = @sql_w+' AND ( PR.CD_CLIENTE IN ( SELECT CD_EMPRESA FROM #TMP_EMPRESA (NOLOCK) ) ) '              END            ELSE            BEGIN              INSERT INTO #TMP_GRUPO( CD_GRUPO )       SELECT DISTINCT PG.CD_GRUPO       FROM TPERMISSAO_GRUPO PG ( NOLOCK )      WHERE ( PG.CD_USUARIO = @cd_usuario )            SET @sql_w = @sql_w+' AND ( PR.CD_GRUPO IN ( SELECT CD_GRUPO FROM #TMP_GRUPO (NOLOCK) ) ) '              END          END              ELSE          BEGIN            --seleciona os códigos das empresas ou grupo            INSERT INTO #TMP_EMPRESA ( CD_EMPRESA )            SELECT DISTINCT CD_EMPRESA            FROM TEMPRESA_NAC ( NOLOCK )             WHERE ( CD_EMPRESA <> '00001' )              AND ( @tx_filtro IN ( CD_GRUPO  , 'X' ) OR @tx_filtro IN ( CD_EMPRESA, 'X' ) )                      SET @sql_w = @sql_w+' AND ( PR.CD_CLIENTE IN ( SELECT CD_EMPRESA FROM #TMP_EMPRESA (NOLOCK) ) ) '          END        END        --inclui a area ou sub-area na pesquisa        IF @cd_filtro IN  IF @tx_filtro <> 'X'        BEGIN          IF @tx_from  IS NOT NULL SET @sql_f = @sql_f+' '+@tx_from+' '          IF @tx_where IS NOT NULL SET @sql_w = @sql_w+' AND ( '+@tx_where+' =      ELSE 0                         END,        IN_DIAS_ACIMA  = CASE                           WHEN @nr_dias > PR.NR_META THEN 1                           ELSE 0                         END,        NR_DIAS_ACIMA  = CASE                           WHEN @nr_dias > PR.NR_META THEN @nr_dias                           ELSE 0                         END      FROM #TMP_DIAS PR      WHERE NR_PROCESSO = @cd_usuario, @nr_ident, SV.CD_GRUPO, PR.CD_SERVICO, COUNT(PR.CD_SERVICO) AS VL_TOTAL_PROC, PR.NR_META AS VL_META,      SUM(IN_DIAS_ABAIXO) AS VL_META_ABAIXO,      SUM(NR_DIAS_ABAIXO) / CASE WHEN SUM(IN_DIAS_ABAIXO)=0 THEN 1 ELSE SUM(IN_DIAS_ABAIXO) END AS VL_MEDIA_ABAIXO,      SUM(IN_DIAS_ACIMA) AS VL_META_ACIMA,      SUM(NR_DIAS_ACIMA) / CASE WHEN SUM(IN_DIAS_ACIMA)=0 THEN 1 ELSE CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.sp_renamediagram   (    @diagramname   sysname,    @owner_id  int = null,    @new_diagramname sysname      )   WITH EXECUTE AS 'dbo'   AS   BEGIN    set nocount on    declare @theId    int    declare @IsDbo    int        declare @UIDFound   int    declare @DiagId   int    declare @DiagIdTarg  int    declare @u_name   sysname    if((@diagramname is null) or (@new_diagramname is null))    begin     RAISERROR ('Invalid value', 16, 1);     return -1    end       EXECUTE AS CALLER;    select @theId = DATABASE_PRINCIPAL_ID();    select @IsDbo = IS_MEMBER(N'db_owner');     if(@owner_id is null)     select @owner_id = @theId;    REVERT;       select @u_name = USER_NAME(@owner_id)       select @DiagId = diagram_id, @UIDFound = principal_id from dbo.sysdiagrams where principal_id = @owner_id and name = @diagramname     if(@DiagId IS NULL or (@IsDbo = 0 and @UIDFound <> @theId))    begin     RAISERROR ('Diagram does not exist or you do not have permission.', 16, 1)     return -3    end       -- if((@u_name is not null) and (@new_diagramname = @diagramname)) -- nothing will change    -- return 0;       if(@u_name is null)     select @DiagIdTarg = diagram_id from dbo.sysdiagrams where principal_id = @theId and name = @new_diagramname    else     select @DiagIdTarg = diagram_id from dbo.sysdiagrams where principal_id = @owner_id and name = @new_diagramname       if((@DiagIdTarg is not null) and  @DiagId <> @DiagIdTarg)    begin     RAISERROR ('The name is already used.', 16, 1);     return -2    end         if(@u_name is null)     update dbo.sysdiagrams set [name] = @new_diagramname, principal_id = @theId where diagram_id = @DiagId    else     update dbo.sysdiagrams set [name] = @new_diagramname where diagram_id = @DiagId    return 0   END

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.sp_upgraddiagrams   AS   BEGIN    IF OBJECT_ID(N'dbo.sysdiagrams') IS NOT NULL     return 0;       CREATE TABLE dbo.sysdiagrams    (     name sysname NOT NULL,     principal_id int NOT NULL, -- we may change it to varbinary(85)     diagram_id int PRIMARY KEY IDENTITY,     version int,        definition varbinary(max)     CONSTRAINT UK_principal_name UNIQUE     (      principal_id,      name     )    );        /* Add this if we need to have some form of extended properties for diagrams */    /*    IF OBJECT_ID(N'dbo.sysdiagram_properties') IS NULL    BEGIN     CREATE TABLE dbo.sysdiagram_properties     (      diagram_id int,      name sysname,      value varbinary(max) NOT NULL     )    END    */      IF OBJECT_ID(N'dbo.dtproperties') IS NOT NULL    begin     insert into dbo.sysdiagrams     (      [name],      [principal_id],      [version],      [definition]     )     select        convert(sysname, dgnm.[uvalue]),      DATABASE_PRINCIPAL_ID(N'dbo'),   -- will change to the sid of sa      0,       -- zero for old format, dgdef.[version],      dgdef.[lvalue]     from dbo.[dtproperties] dgnm      inner join dbo.[dtproperties] dggd on dggd.[property] = 'DtgSchemaGUID' and dggd.[objectid] = dgnm.[objectid]       inner join dbo.[dtproperties] dgdef on dgdef.[property] = 'DtgSchemaDATA' and dgdef.[objectid] = dgnm.[objectid]           where dgnm.[property] = 'DtgSchemaNAME' and dggd.[uvalue] like N'_EA3E6268-D998-11CE-9454-00AA00A3F36E_'      return 2;    end    return 1;   END

/*-------------------------------------------------------------------------------  Stored Procedure: sp_view_codigo_vago   Objetivo: procura códigos vagos no caso do novo código ser maior que a quantidade            de personalizações existentes no menu/sub-menu e assim evitar um String            Truncated.  -------------------------------------------------------------------------------*/  /**/  CREATE PROCEDURE sp_view_codigo_vago (    @cd_usuario char(4),    @cd_menu    char(2),    @cd_subm    char(2),    @cd_view_nr int output  ) AS  --*/  /*  DECLARE    @cd_usuario char(4),    @cd_menu    char(2),    @cd_subm    char(2),    @cd_view_nr int    SET @cd_usuario = '0141'  SET @cd_menu    = '01'  SET @cd_subm    = '01'  --*/  DECLARE    @cd_view_pos char(2),    @cd_view_ant char(2),    @contador int  --seleciona os códigos das views  DECLARE cView CURSOR LOCAL FOR    SELECT SUBSTRING(M06_CD_VIEW, 11, 2)    FROM M06_VIEW (NOLOCK)    WHERE M06_CD_USUARIO = @cd_usuario      AND M06_CD_MENU    = @cd_menu      AND M06_CD_SUBM    = @cd_subm    ORDER BY M06_CD_VIEW  --zera o contador  SET @contador = 0    OPEN cView  FETCH cView INTO @cd_view_pos  --verifica o código anterior e posterio e verifica se há algum vago entre eles.  WHILE @@fetch_status = 0  BEGIN    IF @contador <> 0      BEGIN      IF (CAST(@cd_view_pos AS int) - CAST(@cd_view_ant AS int)) > 1      BEGIN        SET @cd_view_nr = CAST(@cd_view_ant AS int)+1        BREAK      END    END    SET @cd_view_ant = @cd_view_pos    SET @contador = @contador + 1      FETCH cView INTO @cd_view_pos  END    CLOSE cView  DEALLOCATE cView    IF @cd_view_nr IS NULL SET @cd_view_nr = 1  SELECT @cd_view_nr

/*Função: duplicar as personalizações de um usuário para outro.*/  /**/  CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[sp_view_duplica] (    @cd_codigo  varchar(12),    @cd_chave   char(1),    @cd_usuario char(4)  ) AS  --*/  /*  SET XACT_ABORT ON  BEGIN TRAN    DECLARE    @cd_codigo  char(12), --código do menu, sub-menu, usuário ou personalização a duplicar    @cd_chave   char(1),  --parte do código que será utilizado para a cópia    @cd_usuario char(4)   --usuário que vai receber a cópia    SET @cd_codigo  = '0713-0101-03'  SET @cd_chave   = '0'  SET @cd_usuario = '0713'    -- @cd_codigo = 0 ex. M06_CD_VIEW LIKE '0713-0101-01' copia a personalização  -- @cd_codigo = 1 ex. M06_CD_VIEW LIKE '0713%'        copia as personalizações do usuário  -- @cd_codigo = 2 ex. M06_CD_VIEW LIKE '0713-01%'     copia as personalizações do usuário com menu  -- @cd_codigo = 3 ex. M06_CD_VIEW LIKE '0713-0101%'   copia as personalizações do usuário com menu e sub-menu  --*/    DECLARE    @cd_view     char(12),    @nr_view     varchar(2),    @cd_menu     char(2),    @cd_subm     char(2),    @tp_exibir   char(1),    @cd_cargo    char(3),    @cd_view_new char(12)    IF @cd_chave = '0' --código da personalização  IF @cd_chave = '1' --código da usuario                  SET @cd_codigo = LEFT( @cd_codigo, 4 )  IF @cd_chave = '2' --código do menu+usuario             SET @cd_codigo = LEFT( @cd_codigo, 7 )  IF @cd_chave = '3' --código do menu+submenu+usuario     SET @cd_codigo = LEFT( @cd_codigo, 9 )    SELECT @cd_cargo = CD_CARGO FROM TUSUARIO WHERE CD_USUARIO = @cd_usuario    IF (@cd_cargo NOT IN ('001','040','055','060','088')) SET @tp_exibir = '1'  IF (@cd_cargo = '001')          SET @tp_exibir = '0'  IF (@cd_cargo = '040')          SET @tp_exibir = '2'  IF (@cd_cargo IN ('055','060')) SET @tp_exibir = '3'  IF (@cd_cargo = '088')          SET @tp_exibir = '4'      SELECT     M06_CD_VIEW    , M06_CD_MENU   , M06_CD_SUBM    , M06_CD_USUARIO, M06_NM_VIEW,    M06_IN_EMBARQUE, M06_IN_DT_PREV, M06_IN_DOWNLOAD, M06_IN_EMAIL  , M06_IN_PRINT,    M06_IN_PADRAO  , M06_IN_SYSTEM , M06_TP_RELAT   , M06_TP_QUEBRA , M06_CD_EVENTO,    M06_NR_DIAS    , M06_TX_ORDEM  , M06_IN_DOCTOS  INTO #TMP_VIEW  FROM M06_VIEW ( NOLOCK )  WHERE M06_CD_VIEW LIKE @cd_codigo + '%'     IF ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM #TMP_VIEW ) > 0   BEGIN    WHILE ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM #TMP_VIEW ) > 0    BEGIN      SELECT TOP 1        @cd_view = M06_CD_VIEW,        @cd_menu = M06_CD_MENU,        @cd_subm = M06_CD_SUBM      FROM #TMP_VIEW        -- cria o código da nova personalização      SELECT @nr_view = ISNULL(CONVERT( varchar(2), CONVERT( int, RIGHT( MAX(M06_CD_VIEW), 2 ) )+1 ), 1)      FROM M06_VIEW ( TABLOCK HOLDLOCK )      WHERE M06_CD_MENU    = @cd_menu       AND M06_CD_SUBM    = @cd_subm       AND M06_CD_USUARIO = @cd_usuario        SET @cd_view_new = @cd_usuario+'-'+@cd_menu+@cd_subm+'-'+RIGHT( '00'+ @nr_view, 2 )        -- inclui a nova personalização      INSERT INTO M06_VIEW (        M06_CD_VIEW    , M06_CD_MENU   , M06_CD_SUBM    , M06_CD_USUARIO, M06_NM_VIEW,       M06_IN_EMBARQUE, M06_IN_DT_PREV, M06_IN_DOWNLOAD, M06_IN_EMAIL  , M06_IN_PRINT,       M06_IN_PADRAO  , M06_IN_SYSTEM , M06_TP_RELAT   , M06_TP_QUEBRA , M06_CD_EVENTO,       M06_NR_DIAS    , M06_TX_ORDEM  , M06_IN_DOCTOS , M06_TP_LIMITADOR, M06_HR_FREQ_DIARIA,        M06_FREQ_OCORRE_TODOS, M06_FREQ_OCORRE_SEG, M06_FREQ_OCORRE_TER, M06_FREQ_OCORRE_QUA,       M06_FREQ_OCORRE_QUI, M06_FREQ_OCORRE_SEX, M06_FREQ_OCORRE_SAB, M06_FREQ_OCORRE_DOM, M06_DIAS_FREQ_OCORRE,        M06_CD_ARQUIVO, M06_CD_GRUPO, M06_CD_CLIENTE, M06_CD_MODAL, M06_CD_UNIDADE, M06_CD_TRANSP,       M06_CD_AREA, M06_CD_CELULA, M06_CD_ARMADOR, M06_CD_IMPORTADOR,       M06_TP_LIMITADOR_AUX, M06_CD_EVENTO_2, M06_TP_LIMITADOR_2, M06_TP_LIMITADOR_AUX_2, M06_NR_DIAS_2, M06_TP_ORDEM, M06_CD_CAMPO     )      SELECT       @cd_view_new   , M06_CD_MENU   , M06_CD_SUBM    , @cd_usuario   , M06_NM_VIEW,       M06_IN_EMBARQUE, M06_IN_DT_PREV, M06_IN_DOWNLOAD, M06_IN_EMAIL  , M06_IN_PRINT,       M06_IN_PADRAO  , M06_IN_SYSTEM , M06_TP_RELAT   , M06_TP_QUEBRA , M06_CD_EVENTO,       M06_NR_DIAS    , M06_TX_ORDEM  , M06_IN_DOCTOS , M06_TP_LIMITADOR, M06_HR_FREQ_DIARIA,       M06_FREQ_OCORRE_TODOS, M06_FREQ_OCORRE_SEG, M06_FREQ_OCORRE_TER, M06_FREQ_OCORRE_QUA,       M06_FREQ_OCORRE_QUI, M06_FREQ_OCORRE_SEX, M06_FREQ_OCORRE_SAB, M06_FREQ_OCORRE_DOM, M06_DIAS_FREQ_OCORRE,        M06_CD_ARQUIVO, M06_CD_GRUPO, M06_CD_CLIENTE, M06_CD_MODAL, M06_CD_UNIDADE, M06_CD_TRANSP,       M06_CD_AREA, M06_CD_CELULA, M06_CD_ARMADOR, M06_CD_IMPORTADOR,       M06_TP_LIMITADOR_AUX, M06_CD_EVENTO_2, M06_TP_LIMITADOR_2, M06_TP_LIMITADOR_AUX_2, M06_NR_DIAS_2, M06_TP_ORDEM, M06_CD_CAMPO      FROM M06_VIEW ( NOLOCK )      WHERE M06_CD_VIEW = @cd_view        --seta a view como padrão ou não      IF @nr_view = 1        UPDATE M06_VIEW SET          M06_IN_PADRAO = 1        WHERE M06_CD_VIEW = @cd_view_new      ELSE        UPDATE M06_VIEW SET          M06_IN_PADRAO = 0        WHERE M06_CD_VIEW = @cd_view_new        -- inclui os filtros da personalização      INSERT INTO M13_VIEW_FILTRO (        M13_CD_VIEW, M13_CD_FILTRO, M13_NR_ORDEM, M13_IN_PADRAO, M13_VL_PADRAO      )      SELECT        @cd_view_new, M13_CD_FILTRO, M13_NR_ORDEM, M13_IN_PADRAO, M13_VL_PADRAO      FROM M13_VIEW_FILTRO ( NOLOCK )        INNER JOIN M11_FILTRO (NOLOCK) ON M11_CD_FILTRO = M13_CD_FILTRO      WHERE M13_CD_VIEW = @cd_view        AND M11_TP_EXIBIR >= @tp_exibir        -- inclui os campos da personalização      INSERT INTO M14_VIEW_CAMPO (        M14_CD_VIEW, M14_CD_CAMPO, M14_NR_ORDEM, M14_TP_KPI, M14_TP_KPI_AUX      )      SELECT        @cd_view_new, M14_CD_CAMPO, M14_NR_ORDEM, M14_TP_KPI, M14_TP_KPI_AUX      FROM M14_VIEW_CAMPO ( NOLOCK )        LEFT JOIN M12_CAMPO (NOLOCK) ON M12_CD_CAMPO = M14_CD_CAMPO      WHERE M14_CD_VIEW = @cd_view        AND (M12_TP_EXIBIR >= @tp_exibir              OR SUBSTRING(M14_CD_CAMPO,1,3) = 'kpi'             OR SUBSTRING(M14_CD_CAMPO,1,3) = 'arq')                   IF (@cd_menu = '01' OR @cd_menu = '02') AND @cd_subm = '03'       BEGIN        INSERT INTO M19_VIEW_HORARIO (        M19_CD_VIEW, M19_NR_ALERTA, M19_HR_ALERTA, M19_DT_ULTIMA_EXEC)     SELECT     @cd_view_new, M19_NR_ALERTA, M19_HR_ALERTA, M19_DT_ULTIMA_EXEC     FROM M19_VIEW_HORARIO ( NOLOCK )     WHERE M19_CD_VIEW = @cd_view      END                DELETE FROM #TMP_VIEW WHERE M06_CD_VIEW = @cd_view    END   END  ELSE    RETURN(0) --PRINT 'FALHOU'    DROP TABLE #TMP_VIEW  /*  select * from m06_view ( nolock )   where m06_cd_usuario = @cd_usuario    and m06_cd_menu = @cd_menu    and m06_cd_subm = @cd_subm    select m13_view_filtro.*  from m13_view_filtro ( nolock ), m06_view ( nolock )  where m06_cd_view = m13_cd_view    and m06_cd_usuario = @cd_usuario    and m06_cd_menu = @cd_menu    and m06_cd_subm = @cd_subm    select m14_view_campo.*  from m14_view_campo  ( nolock ), m06_view ( nolock )  where m06_cd_view = m14_cd_view    and m06_cd_usuario = @cd_usuario    and m06_cd_menu = @cd_menu    and m06_cd_subm = @cd_subm    ROLLBACK TRAN  SET XACT_ABORT OFF  --*/

CREATE PROCEDURE spWriteStringToFile   (  @String Varchar(8000), --8000 in SQL Server 2000  @Path VARCHAR(255),  @Filename VARCHAR(100)    --  )  AS  DECLARE  @objFileSystem int          ,@objTextStream int,    @objErrorObject int,    @strErrorMessage Varchar(1000),       @Command varchar(1000),       @hr int,    @fileAndPath varchar(80)    set nocount on    select @strErrorMessage='opening the File System Object'  EXECUTE @hr = sp_OACreate  'Scripting.FileSystemObject' , @objFileSystem OUT    Select @FileAndPath=@path+'\'+@filename  if @HR=0 Select @objErrorObject=@objFileSystem , @strErrorMessage='Creating file "'+@FileAndPath+'"'  if @HR=0 execute @hr = sp_OAMethod   @objFileSystem   , 'CreateTextFile'   , @objTextStream OUT, @FileAndPath,2,True    if @HR=0 Select @objErrorObject=@objTextStream,    @strErrorMessage='writing to the file "'+@FileAndPath+'"'  if @HR=0 execute @hr = sp_OAMethod  @objTextStream, 'Write', Null, @String    if @HR=0 Select @objErrorObject=@objTextStream, @strErrorMessage='closing the file "'+@FileAndPath+'"'  if @HR=0 execute @hr = sp_OAMethod  @objTextStream, 'Close'    if @hr<>0   begin   Declare     @Source varchar(255),    @Description Varchar(255),    @Helpfile Varchar(255),    @HelpID int      EXECUTE sp_OAGetErrorInfo  @objErrorObject,     @source output,@Description output,@Helpfile output,@HelpID output   Select @strErrorMessage='Error whilst '     +coalesce(@strErrorMessage,'doing something')     +', '+coalesce(@Description,'')   raiserror (@strErrorMessage,16,1)   end  EXECUTE  sp_OADestroy @objTextStream  EXECUTE sp_OADestroy @objTextStream
